* etablerar rutiner, standarder och dokumentation som gör leveransen mindre sårbar och mer skalbar
* omsätter tekniska behov och risker till tydliga rekommendationer och välgrundade beslut
* bygger förtroende genom att vara tydlig, ansvarstagande och relevant i dialogen med kunden


 Du arbetar nära kundens tekniska team och i samverkan med Advanias specialister inom infrastruktur och säkerhet för att säkerställa en helhet som fungerar över tid.
   

  

 Ditt ansvar i praktiken
   

  

 Du arbetar självständigt med både daglig drift och långsiktig förvaltning av SAP miljön. Du ansvarar för att hålla ihop den tekniska leveransen, prioritera rätt och driva arbetet framåt inom givna ramar.
   

  

**I rollen ingår att:**
* installera, konfigurera och uppgradera SAP system
* arbeta med löpande systemadministration, övervakning och prestandaoptimering
* hantera patchning och kernel uppgraderingar
* arbeta med backup och restore
* hantera systemlandskap i dev, test, QA och produktion, inklusive systemkopiering och refresh
* driva incidenthantering och felsökning samt ha kontakt med SAP support vid behov
* dokumentera, standardisera och automatisera driftsrutiner


 Vid införanden och större förändringar kan planerade insatser utanför ordinarie arbetstid förekomma.
   

  

 Så arbetar du i rollen
   

  

 Rollen kräver ett tydligt
 **konsultmässigt** 
 förhållningssätt och starkt
 **självledarskap** 
 i praktiken. Det innebär att du tar ansvar för helheten i leveransen, förstår kundens tekniska och verksamhetsmässiga sammanhang och omsätter behov, risker och beroenden till stabila och hållbara lösningar. Du tar
 **initiativ** 
 ,
 **prioriterar** 
 och
 **fattar beslut** 
 nära leveransen, arbetar strukturerat för hög kvalitet och driver förbättringar som stärker drift och förvaltning över tid. Du kommunicerar tydligt och pedagogiskt, kan förklara tekniska val och konsekvenser för både tekniska och icke tekniska intressenter och bygger samarbete med kund, kollegor och andra specialistfunktioner för att leveransen ska fungera långsiktigt.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har
   

  

  

* flerårig, praktisk erfarenhet av SAP Basis med tydngd på drift och förvaltning
* hands on erfarenhet av SAP S/4HANA Basis.
* hands on erfarenhet av administration av SAP HANA, till exempel drift, backup och restore, patchning och prestandarelaterat arbete.
* erfarenhet av större och komplexa SAP miljöer inom enterprise och/eller leveranser från Managed Service Provider.
* god förmåga att arbeta självständigt, driva arbete framåt och ta tekniskt ägarskap i kundnära leverans.
* goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.
* möjlighet att bidra vid planerade eftertidsinsatser i samband med införanden och större förändringar.


 Det är extra värdefullt om du också har erfarenhet av
 **HA** 
 och
 **DR upplägg** 
 , exempelvis HANA System Replication eller backupbaserad DR.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!👋
   

  

 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar med Ljung & Sjöberg i ärenden kopplat till alkohol-, drog- och spelproblematik och är en certifierad "Proaktiv Arbetsplats.
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar. ☀️
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: Boendestödjare på bostad med särskild service Socialpsykiatri
description:
Har du idéer för framtiden och drivs du av utmaningar? I Haninge får du utvecklas tillsammans med trygga kollegor som vill göra skillnad redan idag. Just nu pågår ett av de mest ambitiösa förändringsarbetena i vår kommuns historia. Vi bygger en ny stad, cirka 20 minuter från Söder. Följ med på vår resa. 
   

  





  
   

  





**Är du vår nya kollega?**




 Boendet ligger i Västerhaninge och består av 17 lägenheter. Verksamheten riktar sig till personer med psykisk ohälsa som har behov av stöd i sin vardag. Arbetet utgår från beviljade insatser enligt socialtjänstlagen, SoL, och genomförandeplaner som upprättas tillsammans med den enskilde. Stödet planeras, genomförs och följs upp utifrån individens behov, resurser och mål.
   

  





 Målet är att de boende ska få det stöd de behöver för att utveckla och bibehålla sina förmågor samt leva ett så självständigt, tryggt och meningsfullt liv som möjligt.
   

  





**Ditt uppdrag som boendestödjare**




 Som medarbetare i verksamheten ger du stöd till de boende i deras vardag utifrån genomförandeplan och individuella behov. Arbetet innebär att motivera och stödja den enskilde till ökad självständighet, delaktighet och struktur i vardagen.
   

  





 Arbetsuppgifterna omfattar bland annat att:
 


* Stödja vid hushållssysslor såsom städning, tvätt, matlagning och inköp
* Följa med och ge stöd vid vårdkontakter, exempelvis läkarbesök
* Stödja den enskilde i kontakter med myndigheter
* Motivera till sociala aktiviteter och bidra till att bryta isolering, exempelvis genom promenader, utflykter och andra aktiviteter
* Arbeta strukturerat med sysselsättning och aktiviteter utifrån den enskildes behov, förmågor och mål
* Stödja den enskilde i att skapa struktur i vardagen
* Hantera läkemedel enligt delegering och gällande rutiner
* Dokumentera i social journal och arbeta utifrån genomförandeplan
* Samverka med kollegor och andra aktörer kring den enskildes stöd och behov



**Det här söker vi hos dig**




 Du är en stabil person som kan behålla lugnet i svåra situationer. Du har ett empatiskt och respektfullt bemötande och arbetar strukturerat och lösningsorienterat. Du har förmåga att skapa förtroendefulla relationer och motivera människor i förändringsprocesser.
   

  





 Du är flexibel, ansvarstagande och samarbetar väl med andra, samtidigt som du kan arbeta självständigt. Tålamod, humor och personlig mognad är viktiga egenskaper i arbetet.
   

  





**Din kompetens** 



* Undersköterska med psykiatriinriktning eller annan relevant eftergymnasial utbildning, exempelvis socialpedagog eller behandlingsassistent.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med personer med psykisk ohälsa är meriterande.
* Kunskap om psykisk ohälsa och socialt arbete enligt SoL.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift.
* Grundläggande IT kunskaper för dokumentation.



**Övrigt** 



* B körkort är ett krav.



 Arbetet kommer innebära tjänstgöring dag, kväll och helg enligt schema.
   

  





 Du behöver ha tolerans för rökning.
   

  





 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet.
   

  





**Välkommen med din ansökan!**




*I den här rekryteringen har vi redan gjort våra val av annonskanaler och samarbetspartners. Vi undanber oss vänligt men bestämt all form av hjälp med rekryteringen från utomstående aktörer.*




 Anställning kan ske först efter att ett godtagbart registerutdrag från Polisens erhållits.
   

  





 Haninge kommun ser mångfald som en styrka och välkomnar alla sökande. Vår kompetensbaserade rekryteringsmetodik syftar till att fokusera på individens kompetens och därigenom även motverka diskriminering.

title: Office Coordinator
description:
**ABOUT US** 




  





 The Absolut Company oversees the production, packaging and marketing of Absolut Vodka, Kahlúa and Malibu as part of the Pernod Ricard Group, a global leader in spirits and wine. Based in Stockholm, Sweden, and part of Pernod Ricard’s Crystal Brand Unit, we uphold the Group’s commitment to excellence by offering some of the world’s most renowned and enduring spirits.
 



 We aim to redefine the global spirits market by inspiring people from all backgrounds to connect, share ideas and enjoy our products responsibly. We are also committed to long-term sustainability, acting in the best interests of consumers, society, the environment and our employees.
 



 We seek talented, bold individuals to join our team and drive innovation. After all, our brands are defined by lifestyle and mindset, but it is our people who define who we are. So, whether you are just starting your career or looking to take it to the next level, we offer a dynamic and supportive work environment that will help you grow.
 



  





  





**ABOUT THE ROLE** 




  





 Are you passionate about working with an iconic brand that creates and markets impactful and culturally relevant products? Do you want to be part of an international and inclusive team that values collaboration, creativity and fun? Then look no further than The Absolut Company, where convivialité is more than just a value – it's a way of life.
 



  





 We are looking for a third person to join our Office team here in Stockholm. Our team runs the reception and office service with the overall responsibility to create a great Office experience.
 



 This role is a
 **temporary position until end of March 2027** 
 and reports to our Facility, Security and Health & Safety Manager.
 



  





  





**Main responsibilities and tasks:** 




  




* Managing the reception – Keeping the reception area tidy, organized, and stocked with necessary materials.
* Security and Visitor Management – Monitoring entry and exit, issuing visitor badges, and ensuring security procedures are followed.
* Greet guests and manage incoming calls
* Being the go‑to person for parcel handling and courier coordination, including receiving incoming parcels and packing and booking outgoing shipments.
* Staying up to date on export and import regulations to ensure shipments comply with relevant requirements.
* Leading our Health & Wellbeing area by promoting wellbeing initiatives that support a positive and healthy work environment.
* Supporting with administration such as booking safety committee meetings and following up on health and safety statistics.
* Continuously improving practices to maintain a safe, healthy, and well‑functioning workplace.



  





  





**WHY JOIN US** 




  





 We aspire to foster an authentic, open, challenging and innovative culture that supports your long-term professional development. And so, we have created a working environment at The Absolut Company that allows you to thrive.
 



  





 We champion inclusion and value different perspectives. We want our people to be their own authentic selves and we are committed to building a workplace that reflects our global consumer base. We are proud to be recognised among Forbes World's Best Employers and Equileap's top 100 Employers for Gender Equality. Conviviality is in our DNA and connects us beyond borders – you will always be welcomed for who you are and the strengths you bring.
 



  





 This role could be for you if you have:
 


* A dynamic, positive, and enthusiastic approach — someone who brings energy to the office and enjoys being at the heart of daily operations.
* Experience in a service-oriented profession is highly recommended, with a genuine passion for creating a welcoming environment.
* Are acting as the go‑to person while collaborating closely with your team.
* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
* A proactive mindset with the ability to identify opportunities to improve safety, wellbeing, and office workflows.
* Swedish and English proficiency is required.



  





  





  





**OUR OFFER** 




  





 We will provide you with a competitive total reward package that includes base pay, bonuses, training and development. But our support goes further. We want to help you through everyday challenges, encourage you to make healthy choices, take care of your well-being and enjoy work-life balance (we have a great canteen and a well-equipped gym in case you want to shake the day off!). We also provide you with opportunities for professional development and career progression that you’d expect from a global leader in the beverage industry.
 



  





 Read more about us at Careers | The Absolut Group (theabsolutcompany.com)
 



  





  





**APPLICATION** 




  





 If this role sounds like it is for you, don’t hesitate to apply. As an international company, our working language is English, so please submit your application
 
 in English
 
 . All new employees are subject to a six-month probationary period and some positions may require a background check.
 



 We look forward to hearing from you.
 



  





 We review applications on an ongoing basis, so please send your application as soon as possible.
 



  





*As a skills-based organization, we ensure fair processes and equal opportunities. If you need extra support or accommodation during the recruitment process, please contact us. We are here to support you and welcome your application.*

title: Software Engineer (Java/Spark) - Remote Work
description:
At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley.
 



  





 Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide.
 



  





 When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success.
 



  





 Software Engineer (Java/Spark) at BairesDev
 



  





 We’re looking for a Software Engineer with strong Java skills and hands-on experience building or working with distributed data processing systems. You understand how frameworks like Spark handle large-scale workloads, you’re comfortable working in cloud-native, containerized environments, and you care about writing code that performs reliably at scale. Whether you’ve contributed to open source projects or built platform components on top of these systems, what matters most is a solid grasp of how distributed data platforms work in practice.
 



  





 What You’ll Do:
 



 - Develop and maintain Java-based components for distributed data processing platform infrastructure.
 



 - Work with Spark or similar frameworks to build and optimize large-scale data workloads.
 



 - Build and deploy platform services in Kubernetes-native, containerized cloud environments.
 



 - Investigate and resolve performance and reliability issues in distributed data processing systems.
 



 - Collaborate with platform and data engineering teams to deliver scalable solutions.
 



 - Contribute to code reviews and engineering standards across the team.
 



  





 What We Are Looking For:
 



 - 5+ years of experience in IT roles.
 



 - 3+ years of experience with Java as a primary programming language.
 



 - Hands-on experience with Apache Spark or similar distributed data processing frameworks.
 



 - Solid understanding of distributed systems fundamentals.
 



 - Experience working in Kubernetes or containerized cloud environments.
 



 - Advanced proficiency in English.
 



  





 How we do make your work (and your life) easier:
 



  





 - Remote Work.
 



 - Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred
 



 - Hardware and software setup for you to work from home.
 



 - Flexible hours: create your own schedule.
 



 - Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays.
 



 - Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent.
 



 - Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities.
 



  





 Join a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive and make a significant impact!
 



  





 Apply now!

title: Cloud Infrastructure Architect AWS
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens molnlösningar?
   

  

 Du blir en del av Capgeminis Cloud & Infrastructure Services (CIS)-enhet med fokus på projekt- och konsulttjänster i Norden. Vårt mål är att erbjuda kunder helhetslösningar inom Cloud och vi erbjuder en mängd olika tjänster till våra kunder, från strategisk rådgivning till projektgenomförande.
   

  

*I denna roll kommer du ha en nyckelroll i att:*
* Designa och implementera komplexa, skalbara och säkra AWS-lösningar anpassade efter kundens behov
* Ge teknisk vägledning och support vid felsökning under en hel projektleverans
* Samarbeta med intressenter för att samla in krav och föreslå effektiva migrationsstrategier
* Agera som en betrodd rådgivare till kunder gällande branschtrender och ny teknik
* Dela kunskap inom organisationen genom mentorskap, utbildning och skapande av återanvändbara artefakter


**Din Profil**
* Minst 7 års erfarenhet av praktisk design av molnbaserad företagsarkitektur, lagrings- och nätverkslösningar
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av att bygga, migrera och modernisera företagsapplikationer på enterprisenivå
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av molntransformation
* AWS-certifieringar på professionell nivå (t.ex. Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional) samt erfarenhet av automatisering och skriptning (t.ex. Terraform, Python, CDK, shell, Ruby, Powershell)
* Kunskap om säkerhets- och efterlevnadsstandarder (t.ex. HIPAA, GDPR)
* Flytande i Svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Önskvärda kvalifikationer:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av AWS-tjänster (t.ex. AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cloud Migration Factory, Portfolio analysis tooling) samt hantering av storskaliga migreringar från datacenter till datacenter och/eller från datacenter till molnet; drift av datacenter (t.ex. datasäkring, övervakning, larm och notifieringar)
* Erfarenhet av att integrera AWS AI/ML-tjänster (SageMaker, Bedrock, Amazon Q); förståelse för styrning inom AI/ML och ansvarsfulla AI-praktiker


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas:**
* Konkurrenskraftig lön, förmånliga tjänstepensioner och kollektivavtal som ger trygghet
* Fokus på din hälsa och ditt välmående, med initiativ för att skapa balans mellan jobb och fritid
* En arbetsmiljö med kollegor som stöttar och inspirerar varandra, och chefer som har ditt bästa i fokus
* Brett utbud av karriärmöjligheter och tillgång till Capgeminis stora utbildningskatalog, särskilt inom den senaste teknologin för t.ex. cloud och generativ AI
* En företagskultur där mångfald och inkludering värdesätts högt


**Ansökan**
*I denna rekrytering hanterar vi ansökningar löpande. Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov. Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Jessica Fogelsjöö, Jessica.fogelsjoo@capgemini.com.*
 Till denna roll söker vi medarbetare för säkerhetsklassat uppdrag placerad hos kund.
   

  

 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Manager, Value Engineering - Nordics
description:
We're Celonis, the global leader in Process Intelligence technology and one of the world's fastest-growing SaaS firms. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock productivity by placing AI, data and intelligence at the core of business processes - and for that, we need your help. Care to join us?
   

  

**The Team:**
 The Celonis
 **Value Engineering (VE)** 
 team is focused on managing the entire customer value lifecycle, from sales through value realization, renewal and expansion. As a
 **Value Engineer Manager** 
 , you will lead a dynamic team who come from a variety of backgrounds to identify, frame and deliver value to our customers.
   

  

**The Role:**
 As a
 **Value Engineering Manager** 
 , you will lead a team of Value Engineers and drive end-to-end customer value journeys, landing and expanding existing customers (ACV growth) and renewals (renewal rate). You will work closely with the Celonis GTM Leadership Teams and be responsible for the end-to-end value journey for all customers within your region/vertical, supporting customers to achieve their strategic goals and realize significant value using Celonis Process Intelligence Platform. You are a trusted advisor to the Celonis Executive Team, supporting their engagements with strategic customers and senior stakeholders.
   

  

 As a leader in one of the fastest-growing tech companies globally, you will bring together deep process and industry knowledge with a proven consulting skill set and strong analytical abilities. You will foster a positive and supportive work environment for your teams, promoting employee satisfaction and career growth.
   

  

**The work you’ll do:**
**Identify & Frame Value For Prospects/Customers**
* Own the end-to-end customer value journey, including responsibility for landing, expanding, adoption and renewing accounts
* Translate customers’ strategic objectives into high-impact Celonis use cases and evangelize Process Intelligence across prospects and customers
* Communicate the value opportunity and strategic roadmap to C-Level executives in partnership with sales leadership and Celonis executives
* Serve as an executive sponsor across the customer portfolio and solidify Celonis as a strategic business transformation platform for our customers


**Create & Scale Value Across The Portfolio**
* Lead customers through the Celonis Value Journey, support the deployment of new features, apps, and products across the customer base, and advance strategic growth programs in pursuit of value creation
* Ensure customer success and architect improvement measures and manage change within the customer base, while pioneering new methodologies within Celonis’ Value Engineering organisation
* Direct Celonis Value Engineering, Services and Ecosystem resources through the Celonis Customer Value Journey, creating durable value for our customers
* Take ownership and build strategic customer relationships as an executive sponsor
* Host QBRs (Quarterly Business Reviews) and EBRs (Executive Business Reviews) to communicate results and realized value to senior management and C-level executives


**Grow & Lead Celonis Talent**
* Recruit the next-generation of Celonis Value Engineers, while setting a high-standard for candidate excellence
* Develop world-class talent through hands-on engagement, continuous feedback, and active mentorship
* Lead by example and consistently demonstrate the Celonis Leadership Principles (lead with purpose, facilitate greatness, embrace difference, and cultivate balance)
* Effectively allocate Celonis resources to deliver on company sales, renewals, value, and adoption targets
* Communicate success and risks proactively within the organization


**The qualifications you need:**
* Domain Expertise: Demonstrate your business domain expertise, such as in Finance or Supply Chain as well as experience in strategic transformation initiatives (e.g. Shared Services Transformation or System Transformation) and ability to build a compelling value roadmap for the customer
* Industry Expertise: Demonstrate a deep understanding of industry trends and strategic challenges of the C-Suite and build an integrated Celonis Process Intelligence roadmap
* Product Expertise: Experience with guiding customer’s IT teams throughout their Celonis Process Intelligence journey, demonstrating hands-on the power of Process Intelligence and proven ability to accelerate value realization by building dashboards, Apps, Action Flows
* Project Management: Plan and manage project scope, expectations and timelines. Leverage partners from the Celonis Ecosystem wherever possible.
* Executive Stakeholder Management: Experience in preparing and communicating results to stakeholders and management, both internally and externally.
* Value Selling Methodology: Demonstrate experience of following the Celonis value selling methodology alongside the customer journey: including discovery, qualification, value assessment and PoV’s, and demonstrate the full value potential of Celonis Process Intelligence
* Value Realization: Proven track record of identifying and prioritizing use cases, implementing improvement measures and becoming a change agent for the customer by establishing an operating model and training users for the customer to realize value and renew/expand their subscription with Celonis
* Sales & Commercial Acumen: Demonstrate ability to qualify all VE engagements, do discovery with customers directly, steer/allocate resources efficiently, and champion our value selling methodology with our customers.


***Leadership Skills:** 
 Proven ability to lead by example, including being on the front line with your teams, hands-on in all aspects and a role model for the organization.*
**What Celonis Can Offer You:**
* Pioneer Innovation: Work with the leading, award-winning process mining technology, shaping the future of business.
* Accelerate Your Growth: Benefit from clear career paths, internal mobility, a dedicated learning program, and mentorship opportunities.
* Receive Exceptional Benefits: Including generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (RSUs), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, dedicated volunteer days, and much more. Interns and working students explore your benefits here.
* Prioritize Your Well-being: Access to resources such as gym subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.
* Connect and Belong: Find community and support through dedicated inclusion and belonging programs.
* Make Meaningful Impact: Be part of a company driven by strong values that guide everything we do: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.
* Collaborate Globally: Join a dynamic, international team of talented individuals.
* Empowered Environment: Contribute your ideas in an open culture with autonomous teams.


**About Us:**
 Celonis makes processes work for people, companies and the planet. The Celonis Process Intelligence Platform uses industry-leading process mining and AI technology and augments it with business context to give customers a living digital twin of their business operation. It’s system-agnostic and without bias, and provides everyone with a common language for understanding and improving businesses. Celonis enables its customers to continuously realize significant value across the top, bottom, and green line. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.
   

  

 Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this video.
   

  

**Celonis Inclusion Statement:**
 At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.
   

  

**Your Privacy:**
 Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices
   

  

 By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.
   

  

 Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and frauds. Learn more here.

title: Quality Management Professional
description:
Schaeffler is a dynamic global technology company and its success has been a result of its entrepreneurial spirit and long history of private ownership. Does that sound interesting to you? As a partner to all of the major automobile manufacturers, as well as key players in the aerospace and industrial sectors, we offer you many development opportunities.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
**Quality Management & Continuous Improvement**
* Drive projects to improve sales effectiveness, customer satisfaction, and operational efficiency.
* Implement and standardize group quality standards regionally, focusing on sales and customer-facing processes.
* Monitor process adherence, manage quality data, and prepare continuous improvement reports.
* Ensure business continuity and crisis management awareness; support leadership communications.


**Sales Support**
* Lead complaint management by collaborating with sales, customer service, and technical teams to prevent issues.
* Coordinate and drive 8D reports.


**Data, Reporting & Audits**
* Use data insights to identify improvement areas and assess impact.
* Prepare decision-focused reports for regional and group stakeholders.
* Manage certification documents, quality reporting, and support audits and inspections.
* Lead or assist internal and system audits.
* Deliver quality management training in collaboration with staff and management.


**Office & Security Support**
* Manage fire safety training and lead emergency and crisis response plans across multiple sites.
* Act as main contact for suppliers and provide facility-related support.


**Your Qualifications**
* Graduate OR Undergraduate in Business Administration, Engineering, Natural Science, Quality Management, or a related field
* 5–10 years of experience within Quality Management, Business Excellence, Operational Excellence, or Continuous Improvement roles
* Excellent communication skills in English (written and verbal)
* Proven experience working close to the business, preferably in sales-driven or customer-facing environments
* Solid understanding of quality management principles, applied pragmatically
* Experience in an international or matrix organization is strongly preferred


 As a global company with employees around the world, it is important to us that we treat each other with respect and value all ideas and perspectives. By appreciating our differences, we inspire creativity and drive innovation. In this way, we contribute to sustainable value creation for our stakeholders and society as a whole. Together, we advance how the world moves.
   

  

 Exciting assignments and outstanding development opportunities await you because we impact the future with innovation. We look forward to your application.
   

  

 www.schaeffler.com/careers
   

  

**Your Contact**
 Schaeffler Sverige AB
   

  

 Henriett Soós-Németh
   

  

 +36203106714
   

  

 Keywords: Experienced; Professional; Full-Time; Unlimited; Quality;

title: Bidra till effektivt arbete på energi-startupen Calentix
description:
*Är du intresserad av hur ett litet team bygger upp smart projekthantering, ekonomistyrning och effektiva arbetssätt? Som praktikant hos teamet på Calentix får du erfarna kollegor, utvecklande arbetsuppgifter och möjlighet att bidra till hållbarhetsnytta när spillvärme återvinns från datacenter till koldioxidsnål fjärrvärme.* 




  





**Om Calentix** 




 Calentix utvecklar, finansierar och driver system som återvinner spillvärme genom att länka samman datacenter med fjärrvärmenät. Det är en finurlig lösning eftersom ett datacenter därmed kan skapa klimatnytta samtidigt som fjärrvärmenätet får tillgång till energi med låga koldixidutsläpp. Calentix hanterar hela kedjan, från koncept och tillståndsgivning till konstruktion och drift, enligt en beprövad modell som oberoende värmeproducent (Independent Heat Producer).
 



  





 Teamet med tre grundare och en analytiker har omfattande erfarenhet från energi- och infrastruktursektorn och förstår de utmaningar som möter både storskaliga datacenter och energibolag. Här kan du få erfarenheter och meriter av att bygga upp ett nytt företag och sätta en effektiv intern struktur med uppföljning, verktyg, systemstöd och material.
 



  





**Vad får jag göra och lära mig under praktiken?** 




 Som praktikant hos Calentix är du direkt med i kärnverksamheten. Du kommer både att arbeta löpande med två huvudteman och följa med i dagligt arbete för att förstå verksamheten och bidra till kunduppdragen. Som huvudteman kommer du att få erfarenhet av arbete med:
 



  





*Projektekonomi och ekonomistyrning* 



* Uppföljning av arbetsinsatser och tid
* Analys av fakturering och beläggning
* Utveckling av enklare verktyg eller smart systemstöd



  





*Organisation och intern struktur* 



* Organisera och förbättra strukturen på arbetsmaterial och rapporteringsrutiner
* Deltagande vid möten, mötesanteckningar och att koordinera tasks
* Kvalitetssäkra analysmaterial och bidra till att etablera en gemensam intern standard



  





 Arbetet sker på plats på Stockholmskontoret och ute hos kunder. Du får handledning av medgrundaren Ulrika Jardfelt under hela praktikperioden och arbetar nära hela teamet.
 



  





**Kompetenser och färdigheter** 




 Vi välkomnar alla sökande och är övertygade om att mångfald och alla individers styrkor behövs för att bygga ett hållbart samhälle. Därför arbetar vi med en kompetensbaserad rekryteringsprocess, utifrån följande kriterier för matchning:
 



  





*Nödvändiga kvalifikationer:* 



* Praktikperiod inom akademiska studier eller motsvarande
* Relevant utbildningsinriktning förslagsvis inom ekonomi, industriell ekonomi eller annan ingejörsutbildning
* Stort intresse för projekledning, ekonomistyrning eller effektiv organisering
* Språkkunskaper på professionell nivå på svenska och engelska



  





*Övriga meriter:* 



* Viss erfarenhet av ekonomiuppföljning eller projektekonomi
* Hög it-kompetens med vana att integrera nya digitala verktyg i ditt arbete
* Intresse för energi- och klimatfrågor



  





*Personliga egenskaper:* 




 Du bör vara analytisk för att identifiera interna behov och möjligheter och flexibel för att snabbt hitta lösningar i en nystartad verksamhet.
 



  





**Villkor** 




*Praktikperiod* 
 : Hösten 2026, 20 veckor (30 hp). Kan ev. vara möjligt 10 veckor.
 



*Placering* 
 : Vid Calentix kontor på Torsgatan 11 och eventuellt ute hos kunder.
 



*Handledning* 
 : Du handleds av medgrundaren Ulrika Jardfelt.
 



*Ersättning* 
 : Praktikplatsen är obetald och genomförs inom ramen för dina studier eller motsvarande.

title: Projektingenjör telesystem – Trafikverket
description:
Vi söker nu en
 **Projektingenjör telesystem** 
 till ett uppdrag hos Trafikverket i Stockholm. Uppdraget innebär att arbeta med drift och underhåll av tekniska installationer inom väganläggningar, främst i vägtunnlar och öppningsbara broar inom underhållsdistrikt Östra/Stockholm.
   

  

 I rollen arbetar du nära projektledning och tekniska specialister och bidrar till att säkerställa att anläggningens tekniska system fungerar effektivt och säkert.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter** 
 Som projektingenjör kommer du bland annat att:
   

  

* delta i bygg- och teknikmöten samt interna projektmöten
* följa upp leveranser i Trafikverkets underhållssystem
* hantera ekonomisk uppföljning och fakturor
* vara kontaktperson mot entreprenörer och projektets olika intressenter
* arbeta i projektportal och ansvara för dokumenthantering och diarieföring
* bidra i arbetet med kontrollprogram och kundärenden


 Arbetet innebär en kombination av administrativa uppgifter, projektstöd och samordning inom tekniska projekt.
   

  

**Krav** 
 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* teknisk högskoleutbildning om minst 180 hp, alternativt motsvarande utbildning i kombination med relevant erfarenhet
* minst 1 års erfarenhet som projektingenjör, arbetsledare eller biträdande uppdragsledare i tekniskt projekt
* erfarenhet av administrativa arbetsuppgifter kopplade till projektverksamhet
* god datorvana och erfarenhet av verksamhetsnära IT-system
* goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift
* kunskap inom entreprenadjuridik
* B-körkort


**Uppdragsinformation**
* Placering: Solna
* Omfattning: 100 % (ca 40 timmar/vecka)
* Uppdraget genomförs huvudsakligen på plats hos beställaren.
* Möjlighet till distansarbete kan förekomma efter överenskommelse.


**Om Nordic Agir** 
 Nordic Agir är ett konsultbolag som levererar kvalificerad kompetens inom samhällsbyggnad, infrastruktur och tekniska projekt.
   

  

 Vi arbetar nära våra kunder och bidrar med erfarenhet, struktur och engagemang i komplexa projektmiljöer. Vårt fokus är att skapa långsiktigt värde genom kompetenta konsulter och ett professionellt samarbete.

title: Part-time English speaking student to GANT
description:
*Are you a student looking for a part-time job during your studies?* 




*Are you a native English speaker?* 




  





**ABOUT THE COMPANY** 




 GANT is the future of American Sportswear and has been a pioneer of preppy style since 1949. Founded by the Gantmacher family in the college town of New Haven, Connecticut, GANT revolutionized the way the world dresses by creating American Sportswear icons. Today we continue to challenge convention and make clothes for the courageous, the curious and the creative - a community of people who believe you should never stop learning.
 



 GANT enjoys a global presence in over 70 markets, with 600 stores, 4,000 selected retailers and with a team of 1500 employees globally. We strive to become the employer of choice within premium lifestyle brand and are always looking for new passionate people to join their team.
 



  





**ABOUT THE ROLE** 




 As a Customer Service Agent for the Central Europe markets you will support customers mainly over phone and email. You will help GANT's customers before, during and after a purchase on Monday-Friday 9-18. You will be the first personal contact point to the brand. It will be possible to work half days as well as full-time during summer and winter sale periods.
 



 Prior to the shifts, you will receive a two-week onboarding program, which will take place during regular office hours (Monday–Friday, 9:00–17:00) at their office in Gärdet.
 



  





**RESPONSIBILITIES** 



* Support customers with queries in relation to orders, products, stores or loyalty programme, to name a few, within the tonality guidelines, which is done primarily via Service Cloud.
* Report any issues to the E-Commerce teams and the Customer Service Manager
* Handover cases and issues handled to the inhouse team



  





**WHO ARE YOU?** 




 To be successful in this role we believe that you speak the English language fluently. Any additional languages are of benefit such as German or Swedish. It is an advantage if you have previous experience in customer service or working in digital platforms. You are currently a student and have at least one year remaining of your studies.
 



 But most importantly we believe that you are:
 



 • A solution-oriented fast learner who can handle digital platforms
 



 • Service minded and friendly
 



 • Communicative and not afraid to ask for help
 



  





 Does this sound like something for you? We look forward to your application.
 



  





**OTHER INFORMATION:** 




**Start:** 
 As per agreement
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Hybrid solution
 



**Employment form:** 
 This is a part-time consultancy position where you will be hired as a consultant through A-hub.

title: Senior UX Lead with strong expertise in Information Architecture (IA)
description:
We are looking for a senior UX Lead with strong expertise in Information Architecture (IA) to join the Next Generation Intranet (NGI) program within Strategy & Communications (XCDC).
 



 The NGI initiative aims to create a modern, personalized, and scalable intranet that enhances the employee experience across Scania. It will consolidate the current intranet landscape (Reflex and Scania World in Staffbase) into a unified digital workplace that supports both global alignment and strong local relevance.
 



  





 The program has now entered a critical phase where a future-proof information architecture must be defined. There is significant complexity in the current landscape, particularly regarding:
 



 • Global vs local (site/factory) content
 



 • Role-based personalization
 



 • Consolidation of duplicated structures
 



  





 We now require an experienced UX/IA professional who can lead the structural foundation of the new intranet, ensuring clarity, scalability, and long-term sustainability.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Information Architecture** 



* Define and document the global backbone IA for NGI, including top navigation, content domains, and structural principles.
* Design a scalable model for site/factory hubs as a primary personalization dimension.
* Develop a role-based personalization framework aligned with defined use cases (white-collar, blue-collar, managers, content editors, etc.).
* Define clear principles for global vs local content separation.
* Develop taxonomy and metadata models to support filtering, targeting, and governance.
* Create clear mapping between existing intranet structures (Reflex & Scania World) and future-state IA.
* Facilitate IA workshops with global and local stakeholders across multiple markets.
* Ensure IA decisions are documented, visualized, and communicated in an accessible way to both business and IT.



  





**UX & Structural Design** 



* Translate IA principles into clear navigation blueprints and site maps.
* Create low-fidelity wireframes and structural flows where needed to validate IA decisions.
* Collaborate with Business Analyst, Product Owner, and Technical Architects to ensure feasibility within Staffbase.
* Support definition of content governance model and ownership structure.
* Ensure that personalization logic (role + site/factory) is reflected in UX patterns.
* Act as a structural authority in discussions regarding consolidation, simplification, and long-term maintainability.



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Senior experience (8–10+ years) in UX with strong focus on Information Architecture in large enterprise environments.
* Proven experience designing intranet or digital workplace IA for organisations with 20,000+ employees.
* Strong experience working in global organisations with local business units or factories.
* Experience designing personalisation frameworks (role-based and/or location-based).
* Experience conducting stakeholder workshops and navigating complex organisational landscapes.
* Strong documentation and visualisation skills (site maps, flows, IA blueprints).
* Experience collaborating closely with business, UX, and IT stakeholders.
* Fluent in English (Swedish is a plus).
* Nice to have
* Experience working with Staffbase or similar intranet platforms.
* Experience from manufacturing or industrial environments.
* Experience consolidating multiple intranet platforms into a single architecture.
* Understanding of employee experience and internal communications.



  





**Personal Profile** 



* We are looking for a structured and analytical professional who thrives in complexity and brings clarity to fragmented environments.
* You are confident facilitating workshops, challenging assumptions, and driving architectural decisions.
* You balance global consistency with local flexibility and understand the importance of governance in large-scale intranet environments.
* You are pragmatic, outcome-oriented, and comfortable working in an enterprise context where alignment and stakeholder management are critical. You are unpretentious and equally comfortable operating at all levels, moving seamlessly from high-level strategy to hands-on operational execution.



  





  





**Ready for your next career move? Explore opportunities at** 
 Co-Workertech.com
 







**Join our LinkedIn groups for updates on upcoming opportunities! Connect, collaborate, and thrive with industry leaders :** 



* Co-Worker Technology
* Co-Worker Renewable Energy Industry Jobs







**Follow us to stay updated on the latest news, insights, and exciting announcements from our company.** 




 👉 Facebook
 



 👉 Instagram
 







**Let's stay connected and grow together! 🚀**

title: Franchisetagare till Stockholm
description:
**Nytt år, nya jobbmöjligheter? 🚀**
**Vi söker nu franchisetagare till flera områden i Stockholm.** 
 Hos oss blir du en del av en kedja som växer och tar marknadsandelar medan du läser den här annonsen.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder:** 
 Som franchisetagare blir du en del av vårt framgångsrika team och stöttas av vårt starka varumärke. Du erbjuds stöd och ett nära samarbete med vår regionchef. Vi har även ett fulltäckande servicebolag som hjälper dig med allt från juridiska frågor, IT, marknads- eller personalfrågor. Vi erbjuder också kontinuerlig utveckling för våra ledare för att ge dig rätt förutsättningar. Vi tror på långsiktigt samarbete och söker därför dig som vill driva ditt eget bolag mot nya höjder tillsammans med oss.
   

  

**Vem är du?** 
 Vi söker dig som har mäklat i några år och är redo att axla en större roll. Vi ser gärna att du är en ödmjuk vinnarskalle som har en tydlig vision och kommer att jobba hårt för att nå dina mål. Du bör vara affärsorienterad och företagsam för att passa in i rollen som franchisetagare. Det är även viktigt att du värdesätter teamkänsla och trivs i ledarrollen.
   

  

* Det är ett krav att du är registrerad fastighetsmäklare.
* Det är meriterande om du tidigare drivit bolag


**Vilka är vi?** 
 Vi är idag den näst största mäklarkedjan i Sverige – vi är stolta, men inte nöjda. Vi har en tydlig målsättning att bli den ledande mäklarkedjan och söker därför dig som vill vara med på resan. Vårt varumärke har redan gjort halva jobbet – med bank, försäkring & fastighetsförmedling under samma tak.
   

  

**Låter detta som en matchning för dig?** 
 Träffa oss på ett förutsättningslöst samtal eller fika! ☕️ Vi jobbar med löpande urval och all kontakt är konfidentiell.
   

  

 Thomas Persson
   

  

 Kontaktperson
   

  

 Ansök nu
   

  

 0734-410 411
   

  

 Maila Thomas Persson

title: Student Assistant and Summer Staff, Supply Chain Planning MY - Solna
description:
Are you an ambitious, proactive and self-driven student who would like to gain valuable, professional experience? If yes, this is a great opportunity to grow your career in Arla Foods!
   

  

 At Arla, you will work at one of the world’s largest dairy companies, where passionate
   

  

 colleagues will support you in your development.
   

  

**How You Will Make An Impact**
 We are looking for an Student Assistant to join our Supply Chain Planning MY Team in Stockholm. In this role you will work with an array of stakeholders combining operational tasks with continues improvement projects.
   

  

 You will support the Supply Chain Planning team in contributing to a high delivery service to our customers and minimize wastage, while driving end to end efficiency and optimization. In addition, you will be part of continues improvement projects and in the establishment of new ways of working.
   

  

 You will be employed as a full time summer worker for 8-12 weeks as an availability or operational network planner which will then transition into a Student Assistant role in August. In the Student Assistant role we expect you to work 20 hours per week.
   

  

**What Will Make You Successful**
 As a person you are eager to learn new things and have a genuine interest for operations,
   

  

 business and people. You enjoy having a good time at work with colleagues while at the same time performing under pressure and in relation to sometimes tight deadlines. Other important qualities for success in the role are proactiveness, analytical skills, structure and drive. IT skills such as experience with Power BI, Excel or SAP is a merit.
   

  

* You are currently a Masters student in any of the following areas Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Production, Engineering, Business Administration & Economics or any other relevant field.
* At least 1 year of studies completed and at least two semesters remaining.
* Fluency in English is a requirement and Scandinavian proficiency is a plus.


**What do we offer?**
* Student Assistant position, 15–20 hours per week.
* Fixed-term contract of 11 months, starting August 2026 until June 2027.


 As a student at Arla Foods, you can join the Arla Young Community. This vibrant and diverse community connects talented Student Assistants and Interns, offering networking opportunities, knowledge sharing, and possibilities for personal development. Connect with like-minded individuals, gain insights from experienced professionals, and participate in exciting events. Grow both personally and professionally during your time as an Student Assistant at Arla Foods.
   

  

 Arla Foods has collective agreements and offers competitive working conditions. Safety and working environment are top priorities, including random drug and alcohol testing.
   

  

**Application and contact**
 If you would like to seize this exciting opportunity, please send your application as soon as possible! Please attach a copy of your grades in the supporting documentation field. For additional information, please contact Student Assistant Supervisor Nellie Henriksson at
   

  

 nelhe@arlafoods.com.
   

  

**Shape the Future of Dairy**
 Arla is a global leader in the dairy industry, committed to enabling good food choices that make life better, providing people with natural, sustainable nourishment, while taking care at every step to ensure Arla is a choice they can feel good about. If you are looking to shape the future with an ambitious global cooperative that truly cares about your growth, where everyone feels valued and empowered, and collaboration is the core of culture, Arla is a choice you can feel good about.
   

  

 Ref. 106701

title: Audience Expert
description:
**Company Description**
*Publicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients’ challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One.
   

  

 We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, Renault and many more.
   

  

 At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified by Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) and have won the Diversity Charter Sweden Awards in the category Mental Health (2025). We have also been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in a fantastic office in Odenplan and offer a flexible work policy.*
**Overview**
 As an
 **Audience Expert** 
 , you will play a key role in building and scaling our audience capability in a cookieless media landscape, leveraging Identity-driven data, privacy--driven audience activation. The role is hands--on and works closely with insight, media and trading teams to ensure audiences are created, activated, and optimized effectively across media channels.
   

  

 This is a key role within Publicis Intelligence, enabling us to continue delivering impact for clients through advanced audience strategies, identity-based activation and privacy first data usage.-based activation and privacy-first data usage.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Key Responsibilities include:**
* Build, manage, and activate audiences hands-on in Lotame and/or similar technologies, supporting both insight generation and media activation across channels.-on in
* Translate business and communication objectives into actionable, scalable audience strategies using first-, second-, and third-party data.-party data.
* Work closely with media and trading teams to ensure successful audience activation, including troubleshooting delivery, scale, and performance.
* Drive audience insights by analyzing audience size, quality, and composition to inform planning, targeting, and activation decisions.
* Act as an internal point of contact for questions related to audience usage, identity and cookieless activation.


**Qualifications**
* Hands‑on experience working with audience creation, segmentation, and activation in a data‑driven or programmatic media environment.
* Solid understanding of media activation workflows and how audiences are used in buying platforms, including common delivery and scale challenges.
* Ability to translate business and communication objectives into actionable audience strategies and practical platform setups.
* Experience using platforms for audience management, data collaboration or similar technologies (e.g. Lotame or similar)


**Additional Information**
 In addition to a welcoming culture and inclusive environment with passionate colleagues we offer you:
   

  

**Career Opportunities**
 Local and Global opportunities through the Power Of One.
   

  

**Personal and Professional Learning**
 Global AI learning platform where you can participate in +30 000 classes and connect with colleagues from all over the world.
   

  

**Flexible Ways of Working**
 We want to be an employer where work life balance is cherished. We love to spend time with our colleagues at the office but also believe in the output of your work not where the work is being done.
   

  

**Work Your World**
 For six weeks a year, the world is yours. Every employee can work anywhere on the planet where there's a Publicis office. A new city, a favorite locale, or even a different country - Go. Grow. Explore.
   

  

**Mental Health**
 The happiness and health of our people is paramount to us. We work continuously on maintaining a healthy and safe working environment through initiatives that facilitate the well-being of our employees.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Generous benefit package.
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: Senior Enterprise Account Executive - Sweden
description:
Harness is the AI Software Delivery Platform company, led by technologist and entrepreneur Jyoti Bansal (founder of AppDynamics, acquired by Cisco for $3.7B). Harness has raised approximately $570M in funding and is valued at $5.5B, backed by leading investors including Goldman Sachs, Menlo Ventures, IVP, Unusual Ventures, Citi Ventures, and more. As AI accelerates code creation, the real bottleneck has shifted to everything after the code – testing, deployments, application security, reliability, compliance, and cost optimization. Harness brings AI and automation to this “outer loop,” helping teams ship software faster while maintaining security and governance throughout the entire software delivery lifecycle.
   

  

 Powered by Harness AI and the Software Delivery Knowledge Graph, the Harness Platform applies deep context and intelligent automation across the software delivery lifecycle with governance and policy-driven controls embedded throughout the platform.
   

  

 Over the past year, Harness powered over 185M deployments, 82M builds, 18T flag evaluations, 8M security scans, 9.1B optimized tests, 3T protected API calls, and helped manage $2.8B in cloud spend — enabling customers like United Airlines, Morningstar, and Choice Hotels to accelerate releases by up to 75%, reduce cloud costs by up to 60%, and achieve 10x DevOps efficiency.
   

  

 With a global team across 14 offices and 25 countries, Harness is shaping the future of AI software delivery — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to help us move even faster.
   

  

**Position Summary**
 Harness is looking for sales champions and leaders who are as passionate about building the next great software company as they are about blowing out their numbers every quarter.
   

  

**About The Role**
* Exceeding your number- Winning new enterprise logos
* Forecasting correctly, communicating clearly, aligning brilliantly with the rest of the team
* Not being afraid of being data driven - including using Salesforce and other tools to track your progress
* Managing full sales cycle from prospect to close
* Collaborating with other teams, including sales engineering and sales development


**About You**
* A proven track record of driving and closing enterprise deals
* Account planning and execution skills
* Ability to sell C-Level and across both IT and business units
* Consistent overachievement of quota and revenue goals with a strong W2 track record
* Understands the value of utilizing a strong sales methodology such as MEDDPIC when building pipeline and qualifying opportunities
* Proven consultative sales solution skills, including the ability to articulate a clear, concise return on investment value statement
* Ability to maintain a high level of productivity, manage multiple competing priorities, and work effectively under the pressure of time constraints in a fast-paced, complex, collaborative, and team-oriented environment
* Bachelors Degree or equivalent


 Work Location
   

  

 The role will be Remote in Sweden.
   

  

**What You Will Have At Harness**
* Competitive salary
* Comprehensive healthcare benefits
* Flexible work schedule
* Paid Time Off and Parental Leave
* Monthly, quarterly, and annual social and team building events
* Monthly internet reimbursement
* Quarterly Harness TGIF-Off / 4 days


**Harness In The News**
* Accelerating Our Mission to Bring AI to Everything After Code
* Goldman Sachs leads investment in software delivery startup Harness at $5.5 billion valuation
* How Harness runs 16 “startups within a startup” at scale | Jyoti Bansal
* Harness Research Shows AI Visibility Crisis Fueling Security Nightmare
* Harness has been named to the Inc. Power Partner list for software delivery success


 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex or national origin.
   

  

**Note on Fraudulent Recruiting/Offers**
 We have become aware that there may be fraudulent recruiting attempts being made by people posing as representatives of Harness. These scams may involve fake job postings, unsolicited emails, or messages claiming to be from our recruiters or hiring managers.
   

  

 Please note, we do not ask for sensitive or financial information via chat, text, or social media, and any email communications will come from the domain @harness.io. Additionally, Harness will never ask for any payment, fee to be paid, or purchases to be made by a job applicant. All applicants are encouraged to apply directly to our open jobs via our website. Interviews are generally conducted via Zoom video conference unless the candidate requests other accommodations.
   

  

 If you believe that you have been the target of an interview/offer scam by someone posing as a representative of Harness, please do not provide any personal or financial information and contact us immediately at security@harness.io. You can also find additional information about this type of scam and report any fraudulent employment offers via the Federal Trade Commission’s website (https://consumer.ftc.gov/articles/job-scams), or you can contact your local law enforcement agency.

title: Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Make it real with Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) at Capgemini.**
 At CIS, we enable organizations to transform and thrive in a digital-first world. Our teams deliver end-to-end solutions across cloud, cybersecurity, automation, and user experience – helping clients modernize their infrastructure and unlock innovation at scale.
   

  

**Your role**
 We are looking for an experienced
 **Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead** 
 who will play a key role in large-scale enterprise transformation and cloud migration initiatives. This role is critical in shaping successful migration programs by creating clarity, structure, and direction at the very start of the journey.
   

  

 As Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead, you will be responsible for understanding complex enterprise IT landscapes, translating data into insights, and turning those insights into clear, executable migration roadmaps that align technology with business goals.
   

  

**You will:**
* Lead discovery and assessment activities for large enterprise environments, covering applications, infrastructure, platforms, and dependencies
* Collect, structure, and analyze large volumes of data from multiple sources such as CMDBs, discovery tools, workshops, and interviews
* Assess on premises and cloud environments and define target-state migration strategies
* Design and present migration roadmaps, including migration waves, dependencies, risks, recommended migration approaches, and associated cost and TCO considerations
* Translate technical findings into clear, decision-ready proposals, including TCO analysis and migration business cases, for architects, IT leadership, and business stakeholders
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, helping them understand what to migrate, how to migrate, and in which order
* Collaborate with architects, engineers, and business representatives to ensure alignment between technical feasibility, financial viability, and business priorities


**Your profile**
 We are looking for someone who combines strong analytical skills, broad technical knowledge, and excellent communication abilities.
   

  

**You also have:**
* Proven experience leading discovery and assessment phases in enterprise migration projects
* Strong background in on premises infrastructure (data centers, servers, networks, storage, virtualization, operating systems)
* Solid experience with public cloud platforms (Azure, AWS and/or GCP) and cloud migration concepts
* Hands-on experience with one or more migration and discovery tools, such as Azure Migrate, AWS Application Discovery Service, AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cast Highlight, Cast Imaging, Cloudamize, and Txture
* Ability to work with complex data sets and transform them into structured insights and actionable recommendations
* Full working proficiency in both Swedish and English


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* A challenging career in a vibrant environment with access to extensive training, a global network of experts, and an innovative culture that promotes learning, growth, and shared success
* Work on large, business-critical transformation programs, helping organizations modernize their IT landscapes and move confidently toward the future
* A company culture driven by core values: Honesty, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, Fun, and Boldness
* A strong commitment to inclusion, diversity, and supporting the whole person


**Ready to make it real? Explore opportunities with CIS and shape the future of digital infrastructure.**
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Experienced Gameplay Programmer- Stellaris
description:
A galaxy of stories, built by people who care.
   

  

 We are a passionate team creating a living world that millions of players lose themselves in, and we are looking for an experienced gameplay programmer who wants to help shape where it goes next.
   

  

 Your mission
   

  

 As an Experienced Gameplay Programmer on Stellaris you will be responsible for complex systems across the full breadth of the game: designing and implementing architectural decisions for upcoming expansions, and helping improve the codebase as a whole. You will work shoulder to shoulder with designers and artists, contributing your perspective not just on how things are built but on what gets built and why. You will be someone the team turns to for technical guidance, and someone who helps the people around you grow.
   

  

 Key responsibilities
   

  

* Design and implement new architectural systems for Stellaris expansions
* Lead technical decisions within your domain and contribute to broader architectural discussions
* Improve, refactor, and maintain existing game systems, with an eye for performance and long-term codebase health
* Investigate and fix bugs, including complex and systemic issues
* Profile and optimise game systems to deliver a smooth player experience
* Collaborate closely with designers, artists and QA bringing both technical depth and design instinct to the conversation
* Help junior and mid-level programmers grow through code review, knowledge sharing, and hands-on guidance
* Plan and scope your own work with a high degree of independence, and flag risks early


 Who you are
   

  

 You are confident and focused. You can navigate a large, evolving codebase, context-switch between tasks without losing momentum, and drive work to completion independently.
   

  

 You are a great communicator. You share early, explain your thinking clearly, and make it easy for designers, artists, and other programmers to work with you. You are approachable, and people feel comfortable coming to you with questions.
   

  

 You are a quick learner with a can-do attitude. Stellaris has nearly a decade of development history and there is a lot to discover. You find that energising, not daunting, and you know how to find your footing in unfamiliar territory.
   

  

 You care about the game, not just the code. You are as interested in the design of what you are building as the technical implementation of it, and you bring opinions and ideas to those conversations.
   

  

 You are comfortable with change. Plans shift, designs evolve, and sometimes the right call is to start over. You stay grounded and help the team navigate the change.
   

  

 What we're looking for
   

  

* 5 or more years of professional C++ experience in game development, including on a live game with an active player base
* Comfortable navigating and working across a large, complex codebase
* Able to own and drive architecture decisions within your domain
* Interest in performance and profiling, and the habits to back it up
* Strong communication skills and the ability to contribute confidently to design conversations
* Comfortable with Git and Visual Studio
* Good written and spoken English


 Nice to have
   

  

* Familiarity with Stellaris or a general interest in grand strategy and 4X games
* Experience working on games targeting Linux or Mac
* Comfortable planning and tracking work in Jira or a similar tool


 Work culture
   

  

 We are a passionate team that genuinely cares about the games we make and the players who play them. Player feedback shapes everything we do, and we take pride in building something people love.
   

  

 The team runs on trust. We have a flat hierarchy and high autonomy. You will have real autonomy over how you approach your work, and everyone here has a voice in how the game evolves. Good ideas are welcome regardless of where they come from.
   

  

 We work collaboratively. Programmers, designers, and artists work closely together, and the best things we make come from all of us building them as a team. Experienced programmers here are a key part of that culture: they raise the level of the whole team, not just their own work.
   

  

 We believe in growing together. There will be people to learn from, and you will have the chance to be that for others.
   

  

 If you think that this description matches you, we highly encourage you to apply as soon as possible as we will interview candidates continuously. If you don't match all the requirements, please demonstrate how your passion, attitude and interest in Paradox might compensate for this.
   

  

 At Paradox Interactive we celebrate difference and care deeply about diversity and inclusion. We, therefore, encourage you, no matter who you are, to apply for this job if you think you’d be a great addition to our team.
   

  

 Practical information
   

  

* Scope: Full-time and permanent with a 6 -month probation period
* Reports to: Managing Tech Lead
* Location: Stockholm, Sweden. Relocation will not be provided.
* Salary: The salary range for this position starts at SEK 47,000 per month. The final salary will be determined based on the candidate’s relevant experience, qualifications, and overall alignment with the requirements of the role.

title: Enterprise Growth Account Executive
description:
Flexera saves customers billions of dollars in wasted technology spend. A pioneer in Hybrid ITAM and FinOps, Flexera provides award-winning, data-oriented SaaS solutions for technology value optimization (TVO), enabling IT, finance, procurement and cloud teams to gain deep insights into cost optimization, compliance and risks for each business service. Flexera One solutions are built on a set of definitive customer, supplier and industry data, powered by our Technology Intelligence Platform, that enables organizations to visualize their Enterprise Technology Blueprint™ in hybrid environments—from on-premises to SaaS to containers to cloud.
   

  

 We’re transforming the software industry.  We’re Flexera.  With
 **more than 50,000 customers** 
 across the world, we’re achieving that goal. But we know we can’t do any of that without our team. Ready to help us re-imagine the industry during a time of substantial growth and ambitious plans?  Come and see why
 **we’re consistently recognized by Gartner, Forrester and IDC** 
 as a category leader in the marketplace. Learn more at
 **flexera.com**
 The Enterprise Growth Account Executivewill be responsible for targeting and securing new logos where Flexera has no existing footprint. Your success will directly impact the company's growth and revenue objectives. You will be responsible for meeting and exceeding annual quota (~500,000) through execution of prospecting sales strategies and accurate forecasting. You will meet/exceed revenue goals by partnering with a team of Solution Engineers, Business Development, Channel, Marketing, and other members of the Flexera organization.
   

  

***Responsibilities:***
* Prospect across a broad range of accounts utilizing various lead generation techniques to uncover new business opportunities and cultivate a robust pipeline
* Establish trust and credibility with prospective clients by demonstrating a deep understanding of their business challenges
* Conducting a comprehensive needs assessments to identify pain points, challenges, and objectives
* Articulate Flexera's solutions to precisely address the unique needs of each potential client, demonstrating a commitment to solving their specific challenges
* Foster and maintain robust relationships with key stakeholders within target accounts, leveraging the principles of the MEDDPIC methodology to navigate and understand the dynamics of each account
* Collaborate effectively with the Pre-sales team to develop and deliver impactful presentations and product demonstrations that highlight the value of Flexera’s SaaS solutions
* Work in tandem with Channel & Alliance representatives on joint opportunities, aligning efforts and strategies for maximum impact
* Accurately forecast opportunities based upon realistic assessments and deliver against that forecast
* Address customer objections and concerns effectively providing solutions and building trust
* Navigate and overcome barriers related to migration, cost, security, and performance to drive successful outcomes
* Successfully negotiate to achieve favorable pricing and contractual agreements that align with the needs and expectations of both Flexera and the client


***Qualifications & Experience:***
* Experience in selling Software solutions (Cloud, cloud cost, cloud management, ITSM, ITAM/SAM, data, security, risk management software, application resource management)
* Experience utilizing a defined Sales Methodology (re: MEDDPICC, MEDDIC, Challenger, etc.) for business needs/business pain understanding
* Successful in finding and uncovering opportunities with net new and existing accounts, via creative prospecting tactics and hunting activities
* Full ownership of the end-to-end sales process (this is not an overlay role)
* Strong reputation for exceeding sales quota
* Consultative sales experience targeting relevant companies/businesses to drive cost savings and efficiencies throughout their IT organization
* Highly motivated and professional, with excellent verbal communication, presentation, and social skills
* Bachelor’s degree preferred or equivalent experience


 Flexera is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.  Qualified applicants will be considered for open roles regardless of age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by local/national laws, policies and/or regulations.
   

  

 Flexera understands the value that results from employing a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workforce. We recognize that equity necessitates acknowledging past exclusion and that inclusion requires intentional effort. Our DEI (Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion) council is the driving force behind our commitment to championing policies and practices that foster a welcoming environment for all.
   

  

 We encourage candidates requiring accommodations to please let us know by emailing careers@flexera.com.

title: Interim/konsult: Lösningsarkitekt Stockholm
description:
**Jobba som Lösningsarkitekt i rollen konsult/interim och bidra till hållbar IT-arkitektur i spännande kunduppdrag i Stockholm!**
 Vill du kombinera strategiskt arkitekturarbete med att koda och vara med och forma framtidens digitala lösningar? Som konsult eller underkonsult via Ada Digital får du möjlighet att arbeta nära våra kunders verksamheter och bidra till hållbar digital utveckling. Du är med från design till implementation och skapar lösningar som fungerar i både teknik och affär. Vi söker just nu lösningsarkitekter för uppdrag i Stockholm, både för start i närtid och kommande behov. Uppdragen omfattar 2–3 dagar på plats hos kund, där du samarbetar med tvärfunktionella team i moderna tekniska miljöer. Du har troligtvis eget bolag eller är öppen för anställd hos oss på Ada Digital.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Hos Ada Digital får du chansen att påverka och utvecklas i uppdrag som gör skillnad.
   

  

* Möjlighet att arbeta med marknadsledande kunder inom flera branscher
* Flexibelt upplägg – konsult via Ada Digital, eget bolag
* Hybridarbete med 2–3 dagar på plats hos kund i Stockholm
* Stöd från engagerade konsultchefer som kan tech och konsultlivet


**Det här gör du hos oss**
* Designar och utvecklar hållbara lösningsarkitekturer i komplexa IT-miljöer
* Bygger och vidareutvecklar systemlösningar, integrationer och applikationer
* Säkerställer att lösningarna följer kundens IT-strategi och målarkitektur
* Arbetar nära utvecklingsteam och bidrar i kod (t.ex. C#, Java, .NET eller Python)
* Ger tekniska rekommendationer kring molnplattformar som Azure eller AWS
* Samverkar med IT-arkitekter, utvecklare och verksamhetsrepresentanter


**Ditt team och arbetsplats**
 Som konsult via Ada Digital blir du en del av ett modernt nätverk av techspecialister. Uppdragen varierar, men gemensamt är fokus på teknik, innovation och hållbar utveckling. Du arbetar med kunder i Stockholmsområdet och kombinerar onsite-arbete med distans. Vi tror på balans, transparens och personlig utveckling – alltid med stöd från Ada-teamet.
   

  

**Mer om dig**
