 Du har erfarenhet av lösningsarkitektur och bakgrund inom systemutveckling. Du är van att omsätta affärsbehov till tekniska lösningar och trivs i en miljö där du får kombinera analys och praktiskt arbete.
   

  

**Vi Ser Gärna Att Du Har**
* Flera års erfarenhet av systemutveckling inom t.ex. .NET, Java eller Python
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar (Azure, AWS eller GCP)
* Kunskap om arkitekturprinciper, DevOps och agila arbetssätt
* God förståelse för integrationslösningar, API:er och REST-tjänster
* God kommunikativ förmåga och vana att samarbeta i tvärfunktionella team
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Så här får vi kontakt**
 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag där du antingen blir anställd av oss på Ada Digital eller anlitas som underkonsult, beroende på vilken lösning som passar dig bäst. I tillsättningen strävar vi efter att ge dig en transparent, inkluderande och snabbrörlig rekryteringsupplevelse. Och vi vill veta mer om dig och din potential! För att ansöka behöver du inte bifoga några dokument. Skriv istället en kort motivering och bifoga din LinkedIn-profil. Urval kommer sker löpande och uppdraget kan bli tillsatt före sista ansökningsdatum. Är du nyfiken och vill veta mer innan du söker? Hör av dig till ansvarig rekryterare. Vi ser fram emot att få kontakt med dig!

title: Sr. Sales Manager
description:
****Job Req ID: 25846****
**About Supermicro**
 Supermicro® is a Top Tier provider of advanced server, storage, and networking solutions for Data Center, Cloud Computing, Enterprise IT, Hadoop/ Big Data, Hyperscale, HPC and IoT/Embedded customers worldwide. We are amongst the fastest growing company among the Silicon Valley Top 50 technology firms. Our unprecedented global expansion has provided us with the opportunity to offer many new positions to the technology community. We seek talented, passionate, and committed engineers, technologists, and business leaders to join us to drive accelerated growth and technology-led innovation in the global marketplace.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The Sales Manager is responsible for driving the overall go to market strategy for Supermicro. This includes building plans and programs that will drive business in new markets and new customer segments that leverage our channels, the existing and emerging strategic partnerships. The role will be involved in all aspects of building the strategies and execute in order to generate revenue. This individual must be very strong at working cross functionally at all levels of the organization.
   

  

**Essential Duties And Responsibilities**
 Job included but not limited to:
   

  

* Represent and sell the entire Supermicro portfolio of products and services to large enterprise customers.
* Establish a high level of personal credibility as a trusted advisor to key client executives.
* Research and understand the client's industry. Deeply understand client business strategies and challenges.
* Act as a trusted advisor to client leaders, aggressively shape deals early in the sales cycle. Advance opportunities that result in profitable revenue growth for Supermicro.
* Demonstrate in depth knowledge in aligning Supermicro capabilities to client business, IT priorities, and positioning relative to competitors.
* Build and execute an Account Business Plan (ABP) that includes both transactional and strategic initiatives to grow Supermicro's presence and share in the account.
* Actively drive ABP results through effective account management and reviews.
* Identify, nurture, and close new solution opportunities that result in substantial growth in Super micro share, revenues, and margin.
* Meet or exceed quarterly and annual revenue and margin quotas. Uses margin management techniques.
* Qualify and close large deals of moderate to high complexity and cross-GBU scope.
* Work with all levels of decision-makers in the client organization including the CEO.
* Participate in account investment decisions in pricing and resources.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent work experience preferably in high tech industry
* Minimum 3-7 years of direct sales experience selling server and storage to enterprise and fortune-1000 companies preferred
* Strong communication skills across multiple disciplines, cultures and geographies
* Track record of building relationships with senior executives and decision makers
* Demonstrate ability in the following areas: pre-call planning, opportunity qualification and objection handling, call structure and control, time and territory management
* Experience entering, tracking and reporting data on lead activity
* Consistent track record of meeting of exceeding sales target
* Must have Microsoft Excel Knowledge
* Multi-task and time management skills are a must
* Proficient in English and additional language is a huge plus


****EEO Statement****
 Supermicro is an Equal Opportunity Employer and embraces diversity in our employee population. It is the policy of Supermicro to provide equal opportunity to all qualified applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status or special disabled veteran, marital status, pregnancy, genetic information, or any other legally protected status.

title: Drifttekniker - Vårsta
description:
Fortifikationsverket söker en drifttekniker till driftdistriktet Vårsta där vi arbetar med tillsyn och skötsel i våra fastigheter i södra Stockholm. Vill du vara en del av vår tillväxt är du välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Fortifikationsverket äger, utvecklar och förvaltar robusta försvarsfastigheter för fred, kris och krig. Med vår unika kompetens inom försvarsfastigheter skapar vi säkra miljöer för ett robust totalförsvar.
   

  

****Din vardag – bidra till Sveriges försvarsförmåga****
 Region Östs verksamhet utförs i Stockholm och Gotlands län och denna tjänst finns i driftdistriktet Vårsta och har ett geografiskt område som täcker södra Stockholm. Idag är det sex drifttekniker som har arbetsplats i distriktet.
   

  

 Du kommer att självständigt arbeta med drift och underhåll av vårt fastighetsbestånd. Det innebär tillsyn och skötsel, egenkontroller i anläggningar, SBA-arbete samt avhjälpande och planerat underhåll av byggnader och tekniska installationer och tillhörande infrastruktur som värme- el- va- och luftbehandlingssystem samt styr-, regler- och övervakningssystem. I arbetsuppgiften ingår täta kund- och leverantörskontakter samt att arbeta både enskilt och i grupp. Beredskapstjänstgöring kan komma att ingå i tjänsten. Resor inom distriktet ingår i tjänsten.
   

  

****Kvalifikationer****
**Vi söker dig** 
 som har drifttekniskutbildning på lägst gymnasienivå eller annan utbildning vi bedömer likvärdig. Du har arbetslivserfarenhet från något av följande områden: el, styr, rör, fastighetsdrift, ventilation eller kylanläggningar. Du har god förmåga att felsöka på fastighetstekniska installationer och genomföra reparationer. Du har goda kunskaper i administrativa IT-stödsystem och du kommunicerar och uttrycker dig väl både muntligt och skriftligt på svenska. Körkort lägst klass B är ett krav.
   

  

**Det är meriterande** 
 med arbetslivserfarenhet där man självständigt hanterat serviceorder, felanmälan eller driftoptimering samt felsökt på egen hand eller i grupp. Har du arbetslivserfarenhet eller kompetens inom el, som pannoperatör eller erfarenhet av projektarbete är det till din fördel. Att ha allmän el-behörighet AB eller BB1, kunskap om vattenrening, VVS, SBA, hantering av brandfarlig vara eller erfarenhet från arbete i försvarssektorn, är även det meriterande.
   

  

 Vi kommer att lägga stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet. Som drifttekniker på Fortifikationsverket skapar du förutsättningar för dina medarbetare, därför behöver vi dig som är strukturerad, analytisk, lösningsorienterad samt har en hög säkerhetsmedvetenhet. Du har lätt för att skapa goda relationer och agerar professionellt i din vardag då du har god samarbets- och kommunikationsförmåga.
   

  

****Vad erbjuder vi dig?****
 Tillsammans med cirka 1400 kollegor på Fortifikationsverket runt om i landet jobbar du med ett unikt fastighetsbestånd för att stärka totalförsvaret i Sverige. Vi är stolta över det samhällsviktiga uppdrag vi har där vi genom att äga, utveckla och förvalta fastigheter för totalförsvaret bidrar till ett tryggt och fritt Sverige. Våra arbetsuppgifter är omväxlande, spännande och utmanande och kräver sin kompetens. Vi arbetar med basen i den statliga värdegrunden och vi eftersträvar jämn könsfördelning. Lika rättigheter och möjligheter är viktigt för oss.
   

  

 Här får du goda möjligheter till kompetensutveckling och vi jobbar för att du ska kunna ha en bra balans mellan arbete och fritid.
   

  

****Om anställningen****
 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning och kan komma att inledas med provanställning. Som tillsvidareanställd kommer du att krigsplaceras.
 **Placeringsort är Vårsta** 
 . En anställning hos oss kräver svenskt medborgarskap och innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras innan anställning i enlighet med 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter.
   

  

 Välkommen att skicka in din ansökan med CV och personligt brev
 **senast den 30 mars 2026.** 
 Dina personuppgifter kommer att behandlas enligt dataskyddsförordningen. Din ansökan är en allmän handling och är som sådan offentlig handling enligt offentlighetsprincipen. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter: kontakta aktuell rekryteringsspecialist så får du hjälp med att skicka in din ansökan. De frågor som du får besvara när du skickar in din ansökan kommer att ligga till grund för det första urvalet vi gör. Vi kan komma att använda tester i rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  

**Frågor kring tjänsten**
 Välkommen att kontakta rekryterande driftchef Fredrik Runander 010-44 44 297 eller rekryteringsspecialist Emma Bergvall 010-44 44 557. Det går även bra att kontakta våra fackliga representanter: Eric Bergman, Ledarna, Tommy Eriksson, SEKO, Karin Alm, SACO, de nås via vår växel, tfn 010-44 44 000.
   

  

 Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.
   

  

**Kontaktpersoner**
 Länk till den här sidan http://web103.reachmee.com/ext/I005/1013/main?site=6&validator=61e84dc0c178c1f5fd4ebfb8b7ac37be&lang=SE&rmpage=job&rmjob=2293&rmlang=SE

title: Principal Engineer - Backend
description:
**Epassi’s purpose is to boost everyday well-being** 
 .
   

  

 We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions in Europe. We were established in Finland in 2007, and in 2008 we were the first company to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in Europe. Since then, we have consistently grown, diversifying our products and introducing our services into new markets. Epassi has been awarded by the Financial Times as one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe on multiple occasions.
   

  

 Are you interested in joining Europe’s fastest growing companies? Do you want to impact the wellbeing of millions of employees?
   

  

 If yes, then keep reading and join us to make an impact in a fast-paced and dynamic environment where you’ll play a key role in boosting everyday wellbeing, at home, at work. Everywhere!
   

  

 Epassi’s purpose is to boost everyday well-being. We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions across Europe. We were established in Finland in 2007, and in 2008 we were the first company to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in Europe. Since then, we have consistently grown, diversifying our products and introducing our services into new markets.
   

  

 Epassi has been awarded by the Financial Times as one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe on multiple occasions.
   

  

 We are currently hiring a
 **Principal Engineer (Backend)** 
 to work across all Epassi brands and markets, to be based in the
 **UK, Netherlands, Germany, Finland, Sweden, or Spain – Remote (work from home)** 
 , with regular travel to visit engineering teams across Europe.
   

  

**Your mission at Epassi**
 As our Principal Engineer (Backend), you will be the most senior backend individual contributor in the engineering organisation, working across all Epassi brands and markets spanning multiple European countries. Reporting directly to the VP of Engineering, you will set the technical direction for our backend systems as we build and scale the Epassi ONE platform — a shared platform powering multiple brands across numerous domains with complex regulatory requirements across different markets. We are building this platform with an AI-first development approach, and you will be instrumental in defining what that means in practice — establishing how our engineers use AI tools to write, review, test, and ship production code faster and at higher quality.
   

  

 You will work closely alongside our other Principal Engineers focused on web and mobile, forming a senior technical leadership cohort that drives architectural coherence across the full stack. Together, you will operate at the intersection of deep technical expertise and organisational influence, driving the decisions that affect every product squad, mentoring senior engineers across teams, and ensuring our Java/Spring Boot platform is built to scale.
   

  

 This is not a management role — it’s a hands-on technical leadership position where your code, designs, and architectural judgement directly shape the future of Epassi’s technology.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Will Be**
* Define and evolve the backend architecture for the Epassi ONE platform, establishing the technical patterns, conventions, and reference implementations that all engineering teams follow.
* Own cross-cutting architectural decisions across all brands and markets, ensuring consistency, scalability, and regulatory compliance in a multi-country platform.
* Lead the design of complex backend systems including microservices architecture, API strategy, data modelling, and integration patterns across the Java/Spring Boot ecosystem.
* Serve as the go-to technical authority for backend engineering, providing hands-on guidance on the most challenging technical problems across any team or domain.
* Write production code using AI-assisted development tools and workflows, conduct architecture reviews, and create technical specifications — leading by example and demonstrating how AI-first practices accelerate delivery without compromising quality.
* Champion and define Epassi’s AI-first engineering practices — establishing guidelines, prompt patterns, and workflows for how engineers leverage AI tools (e.g., Claude, Copilot) for code generation, code review, testing, documentation, and architectural exploration.
* Collaborate closely with the Principal Engineers for web and mobile to ensure architectural coherence across the full stack — aligning on API contracts, shared patterns, and cross-platform technical decisions.
* Drive the technical strategy for platform growth, defining how services, APIs, and data models support multiple brands and markets through configuration rather than separate applications.
* Partner directly with the VP of Engineering, CTO, and Heads of Engineering to translate business strategy into technical roadmaps and investment priorities.
* Mentor and elevate senior and staff engineers across all teams, raising the technical bar organisation-wide through code reviews, design sessions, and technical coaching — including coaching engineers on effective AI-assisted development techniques.
* Establish and champion engineering best practices including API governance, service reliability standards, observability, testing strategies, and CI/CD practices.
* Evaluate and recommend technology choices, frameworks, AI tooling, and developer productivity improvements that improve system performance and operational excellence.
* Identify and lead high-impact cross-team technical initiatives such as performance improvements, platform scaling, or infrastructure modernisation.
* Represent Epassi’s engineering organisation externally through technical talks, blog posts, open-source contributions, or community engagement.


**You’ll Be Successful In This Role If You**
* Establish a clear, well-documented backend architecture and technical strategy within your first 6 months that is adopted across all engineering teams.
* Directly unblock and accelerate the most critical cross-team technical initiatives, measurably reducing time-to-delivery for key platform milestones.
* Raise the engineering bar organisation-wide — evidenced by improved code quality, fewer production incidents, and consistent adoption of architectural standards.
* Drive measurable adoption of AI-first development practices across the engineering organisation, with clear improvements in developer velocity, code quality, and time-to-production.
* Build strong trust with Engineering Managers, Heads of Engineering, and fellow Principal Engineers across all brands, becoming the first person teams consult on complex backend decisions.
* Contribute production-quality code and technical designs that serve as reference implementations for the wider engineering organisation.
* Successfully mentor at least 2–3 senior engineers toward staff-level impact within your first 18 months.
* Proactively identify and address systemic technical risks before they become delivery blockers — bringing solutions, not just problems.
* Drive measurable improvements in platform reliability, API performance, and developer experience.


**What You’ll Be Doing (daily)**
* Writing and reviewing code across the most complex and impactful parts of the backend platform, using AI-assisted development tools as a core part of your workflow.
* Leading architecture design sessions and RFC reviews for cross-cutting technical decisions.
* Pairing with engineers across different teams and brands to solve their hardest backend problems — including coaching them on effective AI-assisted coding techniques.
* Working with the web and mobile Principal Engineers on cross-stack architectural decisions, API contracts, and shared platform patterns.
* Collaborating with the VP of Engineering on technical strategy, investment priorities, and organisational technical health.
* Reviewing and shaping API contracts, data models, and service boundaries for platform services.
* Conducting deep-dive technical investigations into system performance, reliability, and scalability concerns.
* Mentoring senior and staff engineers through design reviews, code walkthroughs, and 1:1 technical coaching.
* Experimenting with and evaluating new AI development tools, establishing best practices, and sharing findings across the engineering organisation.
* Documenting architectural decisions, technical standards, and reference patterns for the engineering organisation.
* Contributing to hiring by conducting technical interviews and calibrating the engineering hiring bar for senior roles.


**What You Should Bring**
* 12+ years of software engineering experience with deep, hands-on backend expertise.
* Extensive experience with Java and the JVM ecosystem, including Spring Boot, and a strong track record of building production systems at scale.
* Demonstrated ability to write production-quality code using AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude, Copilot, Cursor) — you should already be using these tools daily and have a clear point of view on how they change the way engineers work.
* Proven experience designing and evolving large-scale microservices architectures, including API design, event-driven systems, and distributed data management.
* Deep expertise in cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure), containerisation, and modern CI/CD and DevOps practices.
* Strong understanding of relational and non-relational databases, data modelling, and performance optimisation.
* Experience working in multi-product or multi-brand environments where platform consistency across diverse regulatory or business requirements is essential.
* Track record of influencing technical direction across an organisation of 100+ engineers without direct management authority.
* Exceptional ability to communicate complex technical concepts clearly to both engineering and non-technical leadership audiences.
* Experience building shared platforms or services that support multiple products, brands, or markets at scale.
* Strong opinions, loosely held — you bring conviction to technical debates but stay open to better ideas.


**Nice To Have**
* Experience in fintech, employee benefits, or regulated industries across multiple European jurisdictions.
* Contributions to open-source projects or public technical writing.
* Experience with event sourcing, CQRS, or saga patterns in distributed systems.
* Familiarity with React.js or React Native — not as a primary skill, but enough to collaborate effectively with the web and mobile Principal Engineers and their teams.
* Experience defining AI-assisted development standards or rolling out AI tooling across an engineering organisation.


**Your Track Record**
* Technical Vision: You see the big picture and the small details. You can define a multi-year backend architecture strategy and then write the first service that proves it works.
* AI-First Mindset: You don’t just use AI tools — you’ve fundamentally changed how you write software because of them. You understand where AI accelerates engineering and where human judgement remains critical, and you can teach an entire organisation to work this way.
* Influence Without Authority: You shape how an entire engineering organisation builds software — not through hierarchy, but through the quality of your ideas, your code, and your ability to bring people along.
* Hands-On Leadership: You lead from the codebase, not the sidelines. You write production code, review pull requests, and stay deeply connected to the technical reality of the systems you architect.
* Cross-Stack Partnership: You work as part of a senior technical leadership cohort. You collaborate naturally with Principal Engineers in web and mobile, finding the right boundaries between backend and frontend concerns and making joint decisions that serve the whole platform.
* Organisational Impact: You think beyond your immediate scope. You identify systemic problems, propose cross-team solutions, and drive them to completion across organisational boundaries.
* Mentoring at Scale: You multiply your impact by raising the capabilities of senior engineers around you, helping them grow into staff and principal-level contributors.
* Communication: You translate between deep technical detail and business strategy fluently, ensuring alignment between engineering execution and company objectives.
* Pragmatism: You know when to build for the future and when to ship for today. You make trade-offs transparently and help the organisation make informed technical bets.


**Why You Should Join Us**
* Be part of an ambitious growth journey and join a global community of driven, bold, entrepreneurial, yet humble Epassians in a company that is constantly evolving.
* Work with a clear purpose — boosting everyday wellbeing — and create a meaningful, positive impact on both individuals and society.
* Thrive in an open and inclusive culture with low hierarchy, where relationships are built on respect, camaraderie, and shared successes and challenges.
* Come as you are — we’ll bring out the best in you and support your personal and professional growth.
* Join a fast-growing tech company with a strong financial foundation, offering opportunities to grow and make an impact together with us.
* Benefit from an inspiring and supportive work environment where employee wellbeing is a true priority.
* Contribute to solidifying our position as the number one player in Europe’s employee benefit market and help shape the next wave of success.


 The hiring manager for this position is Awn Ali, VP of Engineering at Epassi. For more information, contact the Talent Acquisition team on
 **careers@epassi.com**

title: Solution Architect - Red Hat, OpenShift
description:
**Why Choose TD SYNNEX**
 As a Fortune 500 global technology distributor operating in over 100 countries, TD SYNNEX connects the world's leading technology vendors with thousands of partners and customers. With over 22,000 employees worldwide, we play a critical role in enabling businesses to adopt secure, scalable, and innovative IT solutions.
   

  

 In Sweden, we work closely with some of the most influential technology vendors and resellers in the market. Our strength lies in combining technical expertise, commercial insight, and strong partner relationships to deliver complex multi-vendor solutions that create long-term value.
   

  

 This role sits at the heart of our Red Hat practice and offers the opportunity to work closely with customers in a highly visible, solution-oriented position.
   

  

**About the Role**
 We are looking for a customer-facing
 **Solution Architect specialized in Red Hat, with strong expertise in OpenShift** 
 , to join our team in Solna.
   

  

 This is a highly consultative and hands-on role. You will work directly with end customers and partners across the Stockholm area, leading technical workshops, translating business needs into Red Hat-based architectures, and supporting the full solution lifecycle.
   

  

**The role requires regular travel within the Stockholm region** 
 to meet clients on-site and conduct workshops.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Lead customer workshops focused on Red Hat solutions, particularly OpenShift
* Translate customer business and technical requirements into scalable Red Hat architectures
* Design and propose OpenShift-based container platforms and hybrid cloud solutions
* Support sales teams with technical pre-sales activities, including solution design and technical presentations
* Act as the technical expert for Red Hat within the Swedish market
* Collaborate with partners and internal stakeholders to deliver multi-vendor solutions when required
* Provide technical enablement to sales teams and partners (when relevant)
* Maintain strong relationships with key customer contacts
* Support technical project elements through to successful closure
* Stay up to date with Red Hat roadmap, certifications, and evolving container technologies


**What We're Looking For**
**Technical Experience**
* Proven experience working with
 **Red Hat technologies** 
 , with strong focus on
 **OpenShift**
* Experience designing and implementing container platforms
* Strong understanding of Kubernetes and hybrid cloud architectures
* Experience delivering technical workshops or customer presentations
* Knowledge of enterprise IT environments and infrastructure
* Familiarity with Linux environments and automation tools is a strong advantage


**Professional Skills**
* Fluent in
 **Swedish and English** 
 (both written and spoken)
* Comfortable presenting to technical and business stakeholders
* Strong communication and workshop facilitation skills
* Structured and consultative mindset
* Ability to translate complex technical topics into business value
* Self-driven with strong planning and prioritization skills


**What We Offer**
* A strategic and visible role within the Red Hat ecosystem
* Close collaboration with leading enterprise customers in Sweden
* Hybrid working model
* Competitive compensation package
* Strong development opportunities within a global technology leader


**Key Skills**
 At TD SYNNEX, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* **Elective Benefits:** 
 Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* **Grow Your Career:** 
 Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on-demand courses.
* **Elevate Your Personal Well-Being:** 
 Boost your financial, physical, and mental well-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* **Diversity, Equity & Inclusion:** 
 It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer-to-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* **Make the Most of our Global Organization** 
 : Network with other new co-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* **Connect with Your Community:** 
 Participate in internal, peer-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At TD SYNNEX, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!

title: Partner Sales Manager - Benelux & Nordics
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**Regional Partner Sales Manager**
 Informatica is seeking a Regional Partner Sales Manager to join our Benelux & Nordics Partner team. This role is ideal for someone with experience in building and expanding strategic partnerships to drive mutual business growth.
   

  

 Reporting to the Director of Partner Alliances, you will play a key role in executing our go-to-market strategy and cultivating strong, collaborative relationships with a portfolio of partners.
   

  

**Here's What You'll Do**
* Drive incremental business opportunities with key partners in the Benelux & Nordics.
* Develop and execute a comprehensive go-to-market strategy and business plan.
* Establish and align on joint KPIs (e.g., revenue, certifications, pipeline).
* Build and enhance relationships with partner organizations to grow shared business.
* Lead regular business reviews with internal and partner stakeholders.
* Define and implement strategic and tactical plans for sales and marketing initiatives.
* Support account planning and regional sales strategies to accelerate deal cycles and increase value.
* Collaborate closely with Informatica's sales and cross functional teams (marketing, sales specialists, technical) to coordinate joint activities and events that generate pipeline and revenue.


**What You Will Bring**
* A strong sales mindset with a focus on driving pipeline and revenue growth.
* Proven ability to work cross-functionally and influence across teams.
* Experience representing a company in strategic partner relationships.
* A track record of building and expanding business through partnerships.
* Ability to engage with and influence key partner stakeholders and executive


**Role Essentials**
* A track record of exceeding targets in enterprise software sales.
* At least 5 years of experience in partner management and/or direct sales.
* Experience defining and executing a partner-focused go-to-market strategy tailored to the Benelux & Nordics
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience.


**What We Would Love To See**
 Familiarity with the data management landscape and it's relevance to AI strategies, including areas such as Data Governance, Master Data Management, Data Security, and Information Lifecycle Management.
   

  

**Why Join Salesforce**
* Innovative Culture: Be part of a company that's reshaping the future with advanced AI models and cloud solutions.
* Global Impact: Contribute to products that are transforming industries worldwide.
* Career Growth: Access to professional development opportunities, mentorship programs, and a clear path for advancement.
* Comprehensive Benefits: Competitive compensation, health benefits, education reimbursements, family-first policies, wellness programs, and more.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Associate Oracle Cloud HCM Functional Specialist - based in Luxembourg
description:
**This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence.** 
 The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support.
   

  

 The
 **EIB** 
 , the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for its Human Resources Directorate (HR), HR Analytics, Remuneration & Employee Services Department (ARES), HR Systems Unit (HRSYS) at its headquarters in Luxembourg, an
 **Associate Oracle Cloud HCM Functional Specialist\*.**
**This is a full-time temporary position at grade 4.**
**The term of this contract will be 2 years.** 
****As this is a temporary replacement assignment, no extension or conversion of the contract is foreseen.****
* Internal benchmark Associate Business Support IT Applications


***Panel interviews are anticipated for May/June 2026.***
 Purpose
   

  

 You will join a diverse and cohesive team of business analysts and system experts responsible for EIB Group’s HRIS.
   

  

 In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to shaping the future digital experience of EIB Group’s large community of users as part of the EIB Group’s Digital Transformation Program. You will be responsible for business analysis, configuration, quality assurance, and advanced user support activities for Oracle Cloud HCM, working in collaboration with other internal business lines such as HR, GIS, user representatives, as well as external software providers, to ensure the successful achievement of the expected business benefits.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 You will report to the Head of Unit and work in collaboration with other teams within EIB Group’s HRIS users mainly within HR, Group Information Systems (GIS) as well as coordination teams across other business lines within the Group.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

* Collaborate with HR business stakeholders to gather, analyse, and document functional requirements for Oracle Cloud HCM modules.
* Translate business needs into system configurations and functional specifications.
* Identify process improvements and recommend best practices aligned with Oracle Cloud HCM capabilities.
* Develop and execute test plans for new implementations, upgrades, and maintenance releases.
* Coordinate user acceptance testing (UAT) with HR stakeholders, ensuring issues are tracked and resolved promptly.
* Validate system changes against business requirements before deployment.
* Act as the primary point of contact for complex functional issues within Oracle Cloud HCM.
* Troubleshoot and resolve incidents, liaising with technical teams and Oracle support as needed.
* Provide guidance and support to ensure effective use of Oracle Cloud HCM functionalities.
* Stay updated on Oracle Cloud HCM enhancements and industry trends.
* Manage quarterly Oracle Cloud HCM updates, including impact analysis, testing, and deployment.
* Maintain documentation of configurations, processes, and release notes.
* Serve as the liaison between HR business units, GIS teams, and external vendors during implementation projects and major upgrades.
* Facilitate communication and alignment across stakeholders to ensure timely delivery of project milestones.
* Support change management initiatives to minimise disruption during system changes.


**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in Information Technology, or other related fields.
* At least 3 years relevant professional experience, ideally as an implementor or as a system administrator of an HRIS, with a strong preference for Oracle Cloud HCM.
* Good data analysis skills, including the ability to extract transactional data, review data flows between systems, and identify potential inconsistencies.
* Demonstrated ability to propose improvements and enhance processes.
* Familiarity with business analysis, project management, and testing methodologies.
* Good communication skills to facilitate stakeholders’ alignment.
* Familiarity with a broad range of HR processes like recruitment, talent management, compensation and benefits, absence and time management etc.
* Solid functional knowledge of Oracle Cloud HCM, with hands-on experience in relevant modules is a distinct advantage.
* Oracle Cloud HCM certification is an advantage
* Excellent knowledge of English and/or French (\*\*\*) with a good command of the other. Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage.


 Competencies
   

  

**About**
*Find out more about EIB core behavioural skills* 
 here
   

  

 To find out more about our eligibility criteria click here
   

  

*(\*\*\*) Unless stated explicitly as a required qualification, a good command of French is not a pre-requisite for hire. As both English and French are however official working languages of the EIB, proficiency in both languages is a pre-requisite for your future career development. Any language clause in your contract must be fulfilled in order for you to be eligible for a promotion (either via the annual appraisal cycle or via an internal selection process). Proficiency is understood to mean the attainment of* 
*level 5 of the Inter Institutional language courses, corresponding to B1.2 of the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFRL). The Bank offers appropriate training support.*
 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

 Deadline for applications:
 **30th March 2026**

title: Controller inom Data Integration & Analys till Mestergruppen
description:
Mestergruppen Sverige AB är en sammanslutning av fria företagare i samverkan och omfattar kedjorna
 **XL-BYGG, BOLIST, Happy Homes, Colorama och Mal Proff** 
 . Tillsammans utgör vi ett av Sveriges största och mest heltäckande butiksnät, med cirka
 **275 byggvarubutiker och omkring 185 färgfackhandelsbutiker** 
 runt om i landet. Den totala externa butiksomsättningen uppgår till cirka
 **15 miljarder kronor** 
 .
 



  





 Mestergruppen Sverige AB ägs av Mestergruppen AS – Norges ledande aktör inom husbyggnation och byggmaterialhandel. Största ägare är Ferd AS, tillsammans med medlemmar från våra olika kedjor.
 



  





 Nu söker vi en
 **Controller – Data Integration & Analys** 
 som vill vara med och vidareutveckla hur vi arbetar med data och Business Intelligence i koncernen.
 



  





  





**Om rollen** 




 Business Intelligence är en viktig del av Mestergruppens affärsutveckling. I den här rollen blir du en nyckelperson i arbetet med att samla in, strukturera och analysera data som hjälper organisationen att fatta bättre beslut.
 



  





 Du kommer att arbeta nära vår BI-avdelning i Oslo och samarbeta brett inom organisationen – bland annat med kollegor inom kedjedrift, ekonomi/controlling och IT. Rollen innebär både analysarbete och ett mer verksamhetsnära stöd där du hjälper organisationen att förstå och använda data på rätt sätt.
 



  





 Tjänsten är placerad på
 **Mestergruppens svenska huvudkontor i Solna** 
 och du rapporterar till
 **Finance Manager, Mestergruppen Sverige** 
 .
 



  





  





**Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden** 




 I rollen kommer du bland annat att:
 


* Bidra till utvecklingen av Business Intelligence inom Mestergruppen
* Arbeta med både nya och befintliga analys- och dataprojekt
* Samla in, sammanställa och analysera data från interna och externa källor
* Säkerställa kvalitet och struktur i våra datakällor
* Stötta verksamheten genom rapporter, analyser och beslutsunderlag
* Bidra till utveckling av arbetssätt och processer kopplade till data och analys



  





 Du kommer också att ha en viktig roll i att
 **implementera och utbilda organisationen i hur styrningsinformation används strategiskt** 
 inom våra olika affärsområden.
 



  





  





**Kvalifikationer** 




 Vi tror att du har en analytisk ådra och trivs i gränslandet mellan affär och data. Du är nyfiken på hur information kan användas för att utveckla verksamheter och skapa bättre beslutsunderlag.
 



 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:
 


* Relevant utbildning från universitet eller högskola
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med stora datamängder och analys
* Erfarenhet av Business Intelligence-verktyg (meriterande med Diver)
* Goda kunskaper i SQL och databaser
* En god affärsförståelse och intresse för verksamhetsutveckling



  





  





**Personliga egenskaper** 




 Vi tror att du är en person som trivs med ansvar och gillar att få saker att hända. Du arbetar strukturerat och självständigt, men uppskattar också samarbete och kunskapsdelning.
 



  





 Du är:
 


* Kommunikativ och duktig på att förklara komplex information på ett tydligt sätt
* Strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
* Van att driva arbete framåt och leverera resultat
* En person som lever våra värderingar:
 **Pålitlig, Handlingskraftig, Effektiv och Lagspelare**



  





  





**Ansökan** 




 Vi som samarbetar med Mestergruppen i denna rekrytering är
 
 Boardtalk
 
 . Vi ser fram emot din ansökan snarast då urval och intervjuer sker löpande. Sista ansökningsdag är 25 mars 2026. Alla ansökningar och kontakter behandlas konfidentiellt. Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta gärna ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Martin Andersson tel.
 
 070-573 10 10
 
 , e-mail
 
 martin.andersson@boardtalk.se
 
 på Boardtalk.
 



  





 Välkommen med din ansökan!
 



  





  





**Om Mestergruppen** 




 Sammantaget är Mestergruppen marknadsledande inom byggmaterialhandeln i Sverige med ca 285 butiker över hela landet och tillsammans med ca 185 butiker inom färgfackhandeln har de ett av Sveriges största butiksnät.
 



  





 Mestergruppen Sverige är ett servicekontor med ca 90 medarbetare som har sitt kontor i Solna Strand (Solna Gate) med nära till kommunikationer. Företaget har även ett kontor i Helsingborg med fokus på varuförsörjning. Vi är en del av Mestergruppen koncernen som har sitt huvudsäte i Oslo.
 



  





 Som stödfunktion har Mestergruppen ett viktigt uppdrag att tillhandahålla relevanta produkter och tjänster till sina medlemmar/delägare i deras kedjor, för att de i sin tur ska vara lönsamma och framgångsrika. Mestergruppen är en värderingsstyrd organisation som har en värdegrund som värnar pålitlighet, effektivitet, uppfinningsrikedom samt lagspel.Läs mer om hur det är att arbeta på Mestergruppen:
 



  






 https://mestergruppen.se/om-mestergruppen/karriaer/
 




  





  





**Om Boardtalk** 




 Boardtalk hjälper människor att växa och företag att utvecklas genom att erbjuda en nischad tjänst inom search, rekrytering och interim.
 



 Läs mer om Boardtalk på
 
 www.boardtalk.se
 
 .

title: Lösningsarkitekt för CIAM och säkerhetslösningar på Handelsbanken
description:
Vi söker en lösningsarkitekt som vill vara med och forma och driva Handelsbankens lösningar för Customer Identity & Access Management (CIAM). Här handlar det om lösningar som varje dag används av hundratusentals kunder, både privat och företag - genom våra digitala kundmötesplatser.
   

  

**Ditt team**
 Du blir en del av ett arkitekturteam bestående av lösningsarkitekter som är en naturlig länk mellan teknik och verksamhet. Tillsammans har ni ett helhetsansvar för utveckling och förvaltning av Handelsbankens infrastruktur för CIAM och kundnära säkerhetslösningar.
   

  

 Arkitekturteamet arbetar nära våra implementationsteam för att samordna teknik, säkerhet och affärsbehov. Målet är att skapa en skalbar, säker och användarvänlig identitetsplattform som stödjer hela kundresan över tid. Som arkitekt hos oss deltar du även i olika arkitektforum där ni tillsammans bidrar till att utveckla bankens koncernövergripande IT-arkitektur.
   

  

**Din roll**
 I rollen som lösningsarkitekt inom CIAM har du ett viktigt ansvar för att utveckla och förvalta arkitekturen i en etablerad och samhällsviktig IT-miljö. Du arbetar med identitets- och säkerhetslösningar i komplexa system där både hög stabilitet och stegvis modernisering är avgörande. Hos oss blir du en del av ett erfaret team med hög kompetens, en stark samarbetskultur och ett gemensamt fokus på lösningar som ska fungera och skapa värde över lång tid.
   

  

 Vad som gör rollen spännande:
   

  

* Du arbetar nära andra lösningsarkitekter, utvecklingsteam och verksamheten för att omsätta behov till hållbara arkitekturella lösningar
* Du bidrar till långsiktiga tekniska vägval och arkitekturprinciper inom CIAM
* Du driver förbättringar genom dialog, samsyn och uthållighet snarare än snabba eller kortsiktiga förändringar
* Du balanserar verksamhetskrav, säkerhet, regelefterlevnad och tekniska möjligheter i ditt arbete


**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som har en teknisk bakgrund och en god förståelse för hur IT-lösningar faktiskt byggs, integreras och förvaltas i praktiken. Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta med arkitekturfrågor inom IT-säkerhet, CIAM, IAM och/eller cybersäkerhet, och du förstår hur identitet och åtkomst samspelar med digitala tjänster i större organisationer.
   

  

 Du är van vid att arbeta i komplexa IT-miljöer där stabilitet, tillgänglighet, regelefterlevnad och låg risktolerans är centrala förutsättningar. Samtidigt trivs du med att driva förändring stegvis och långsiktigt, anpassat efter verksamhetens tempo och mognad. Du har förmågan att förena målbild och nuläge och att utforma lösningar som är hållbara både tekniskt och organisatoriskt. Som person bygger du förtroende genom dialog, samarbete och saklig argumentation.
   

  

 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av:
   

  

* modernisering av identitets- eller säkerhetslösningar i etablerade organisationer
* att arbeta nära verksamhet, drift och säkerhetsfunktioner
* utveckling i Java
* identitetsprotokoll som OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, SAML samt FIDO2/WebAuthn
* attribut- och policybaserad accesskontroll (ABAC/PBAC) i större organisationer
* regulatoriska krav som GDPR, eIDAS, PSD2 och principer för dataminimering


**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
*Som ett steg i Handelsbankens rekryteringsprocess krävs en godkänd bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidat, utförd av en extern part, innan anställning kan ske.*
**Kontaktuppgifter**
**Rekryterande chef:** 
 Camilla Henriksson, camilla.henriksson@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Talent Acquisition Partner:** 
 Alva Jonerot, alva.jonerot@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Facklig representant Finansförbundet:** 
 Martin Strand, martin.strand@handelsbanken.se
   

  

**Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen:** 
 Paul Gutesten, paul.gutesten@handelsbanken.se

title: Business Development Manager GCC - Server, Storage & Network
description:
**Business Development Manager GCC - server, storage & network**
 Brinner du för försäljning och älskar att skapa affärer som gör skillnad? Då har du chansen att ta nästa steg i din karriär hos TD SYNNEX - en global ledare inom IT-distribution.
   

  

 Rollen
   

  

 Som Business Development Manager för GCC (Global Computing Components) kommer du ingå i ett nordiskt team och blir en nyckelspelare i att driva vår försäljning i både Sverige och Norden. Du får möjlighet att arbeta med några av världens mest innovativa varumärken - Intel, AMD, Nvidia, Supermicro, Micron, Seagate och många fler.
   

  

 I Rollen Kommer Du Primärt Att Arbeta Med Områdena Sever, Storage Och Nätverk. Några Av Arbetsuppgifterna Är
   

  

* Proaktivt driva försäljningen av GCCs produktportfölj genom daglig kontakt med kunder
* Identifiera potentiella kunder och affärsmöjligheter
* Bygga relationer med kunder, tillverkare och andra team inom TD SYNNEX
* Planera och genomföra marknadsaktiviteter och go-to-market initiativ tillsammans med tillverkare
* Delta i försäljningsaktiviteter, evenemang och utbildningar


 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är duktig på att skapa goda relationer och tar ett starkt ägendeskap för din affär. Som person måste du gilla att arbeta självständigt, du är ansvarsfull, strukturerad och sätter ambitiösa mål. Du ser värdet i att samarbeta och gillar att bygga relationer med partners och kollegor.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder dig med de rätta kvalifikationerna ett jobb i ett internationellt företag där ingen dag är den andra lik. Om det låter spännande med ett företag som präglas av högt tempo i en spännande marknad och har engagerade kollegor, är TD SYNNEX en attraktiv arbetsplats för dig. För rätt person finns det goda möjligheter att utvecklas både hos oss lokalt men även inom våra internationella team.
   

  

 Vi är stolta över att vara certifierade som A Great Place to Work, och har en grupp som heter Elevate med kollegor i Norden med fokus på könsmångfald. Dessutom arbetar vi aktivt med mångfald. Vi fokuserar på karriärutveckling och som en nordisk och global organisation har vi kollegor som nyligen har flyttat från lokala till nordiska roller som en del av karriären inom TD SYNNEX.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder också
   

  

* Konkurrenskraftig ersättning med regelbundna årliga löneöversyner.
* Hybridarbete - (3 dagar på kontoret, 2 dagar hemma)
* Vi värdesätter kontinuerligt lärande och erbjuder en tydlig utvecklingsplan.
* Omfattande förmåner, inklusive sjukförsäkring, betald ledighet, pensionsplaner och mer


 Ansökan och om du vill veta mer
   

  

 Skicka ditt CV via länken. Vi vill ha tjänsten tillsatt så snart som möjligt och ansökningarna behandlas därför löpande.
   

  

 Kom och bli en del av oss!
   

  

 TD SYNNEX hanterar rekryteringsprocessen själv och vill inte ha kontakt med rekryteringsbyråer.
   

  

**Key Skills**
 At TD SYNNEX, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* Elective Benefits: Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* Grow Your Career: Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on-demand courses.
* Elevate Your Personal Well-Being: Boost your financial, physical, and mental well-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* Diversity, Equity & Inclusion: It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer-to-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* Make the Most of our Global Organization: Network with other new co-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* Connect with Your Community: Participate in internal, peer-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At TD SYNNEX, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!

title: Inside Sales Specialist Infrastructure
description:
Job Description
   

  

**Internal Sales Specialist Infrastructure Software.** 
  

  

 Är du en målmedveten person med intresse för vår moderna vardag, vill du bli en del av ett härligt team som arbetar tillsammans mot uppsatta mål? Då kan den här rollen vara helt rätt för dig!
   

  

 Plats: Frösunda/Solna, Stockholm
   

  

 Omfattning: Heltid, Tillsvidare
   

  

 Start: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 TD SYNNEX är den ledande IT-distributören både globalt och även på den svenska marknaden med nordiskt huvudkontor, norr om Stockholm samt lokalkontor i Danmark, Norge och Finland. Med unik kompetens, hög tillgänglighet, effektiv logistik och efterfrågade kringtjänster hjälper vi dagligen våra återförsäljare att på ett kostnadseffektivt sätt sälja och marknadsföra IT-produkter och lösningar. Läs gärna mer på https://se.tdsynnex.com/
   

  

**Om tjänsten** 
  

  

 I rollen som innesäljare för Software kommer du att driva försäljningen av produkter mot våra återförsäljare samt ha en nära kontakt med dem.
   

  

 Majoriteten av tiden arbetar du med redan inarbetade kunder, gör analyser utifrån kunds behov och verksamhet samt tar fram offerter åt dem. Du kommer även att arbeta för att öka omsättningen på redan befintliga återförsäljare. Nybearbetning av potentiella kunder är även en viktig del av rollen. Målet är att hitta nya återförsäljare och kanaler och få dem att inse fördelarna av att jobba med TD SYNNEX. I denna roll kommer du även samarbeta med Business Develop Manager med syftet att utveckla affären. Ett av målen är att nå flera återförsäljare.
   

  

 Teamet består av ett glatt och hjälpsamt gäng som är målmedvetna och strävar alltid efter att leverera utomordentligt resultat! Vi söker efter en lagspelare till vårt härliga team. Det är högt i tak och vi hjälper varandra att lyckas. Vi är även måna om att erbjuda den bästa servicen mot kunder och partners.
   

  

**Om dig** 
  

  

 Du är social individ som tycker att det är kul att arbeta med människor samtidigt som du är affärsmässig. För att lyckas i rollen behöver du vara målmedveten, strukturerad och drivas av att nå dina egna uppsatta mål. Du trivs med att ha många bollar i luften och många olika kontaktytor såväl externt som internt. Du känner dig trygg i att fatta beslut samt är kreativ i hur vi kan maximera vår försäljning.
   

  

**Vi söker dig:** 
  

  

 Som har erfarenhet av att ge god service.
   

  

 Som talar och skriver svenska och engelska obehindrat.
 **(Första intervjun kommer vara på engelska)**
**Meriterande:** 
  

  

 Erfarenhet försäljning
   

  

 Erfarenhet av IT-branschen,
   

  

 Erfarenhet av att jobba i affärssystem (som SAP), CRM-system och Excel är meriterande.
   

  

 Vi kan erbjuda dig, med rätt kvalifikationer och inställning, ett arbete i ett internationellt marknadsledande företag där ingen dag är den andra lik. Låter det spännande med ett företag som präglas av högt tempo och verkar på en utmanande och föränderlig marknad?
   

  

 Vi erbjuder även:
   

* 30 semesterdagar/år
* Friskvårdsbidrag 4000 kr/år
* Utökad Föräldralön (enl. Kollektivavtal)
* ITP 1 -Tjänstepension (enl. Kollektivavtal)
* Rabatter till olika gym, t.ex. Nordic Wellness som har verksamhet i vår byggnad.
* Snyggt, modernt och fräscht kontor med bra kommunikationer.
* Great Place to Work certifierad arbetsplats


**Ansökan** 
  

  

 Skicka in ditt CV via vår hemsida.
   

  

 Vi bearbetar ansökningar löpande och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!** 
  

  

**TD SYNNEX - Connecting the World with the Power of Technology™** 
  

  

 TD SYNNEX är den ledande globala distributören inom IT. Vi erbjuder lösningar, tjänster och produkter från marknadens ledande leverantörer. Vi är rankade som nr 60 på Fortune 500®-listan i USA, har 22 000 anställda globalt och är ett av de mest uppskattade företagen i världen för över tionde året i rad.
   

  

  

  

  

  

**Key Skills**
 At TD SYNNEX, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* **Elective Benefits:** 
 Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* **Grow Your Career:** 
 Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on-demand courses.
* **Elevate Your Personal Well-Being:** 
 Boost your financial, physical, and mental well-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* **Diversity, Equity & Inclusion:** 
 It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer-to-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* **Make the Most of our Global Organization** 
 : Network with other new co-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* **Connect with Your Community:** 
 Participate in internal, peer-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At TD SYNNEX, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!

title: Senior Underwriter Cyber
description:
We are looking for a Senior Underwriter Cyber, based in Stockholm.
   

  

**Your Team**
 The Allianz Commercial Nordics team is a dynamic and innovative group dedicated to providing top-tier insurance solutions across the Nordic region. As part of Allianz's global network, the team leverages international expertise while maintaining a strong local presence to address the unique needs of businesses in Denmark, Finland, Norway, and Sweden.
   

  

**The Impact You Will Have**
 Reporting to the Regional Head of Financial Lines Nordics, you will underwrite profitable new and renewal business to meet the Cyber targets in the Nordic Region and in accordance with underwriting guidelines and underwriting authority. You will negotiate terms and conditions and take ownership of your own key clients as well as develop and maintain strong relationships with our broking and client partners in coordination with our distribution/client relationship team.
   

  

**Some Of Your Specific Responsibilities Could Include**
* Underwrite new and renewal accounts to meet top and bottom line targets.
* Negotiate participation, pricing and terms and conditions with brokers.
* Proactively manage exposure and capacity.
* Proactively support acquisition of new business and retention of existing business
* Proactively liaise with Market Management & Distribution on market management initiatives.
* Positively represent Allianz Commercial externally to the market.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with key brokers and clients and other relevant stakeholders.


**What You’ll Bring To The Role**
* Preferably a degree in Law, Business Administration or Economics or other appropriate discipline.
* Significant experience in underwriting profitable business in the Cyber market in the Nordic Region.
* Recognized relationships with brokers at peer group level and well established within market.
* Good understanding of regional/local Cyber insurance markets and competitor landscape, including global elements.
* Fluency in Swedish and English is required. Working proficiency in any other Nordic languages is a plus.
* Ability to assess risk inherent exposures and natural hazards relevant to the line of business.
* Ability to analyse current performance against benchmarks applying how the market operates and functions, the business needs and customer needs.
* Ability to design, develop and implement consistent, robust wordings.
* Excellent understanding of policy administration life cycle, information collection, policy issuance, premium bookings, credit control, cancellation.
* Excellent analytical skills.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to create relationships and communicate clearly at all levels and with a wide range of people.
* Ability to influence and motivate others to act, without executive authority.
* You should be able to integrate AI-driven insights into your work to optimize outcomes and support broader organizational goals.


 92348 | Underwriting | Professional | Allianz Commercial | Full Time or Part Time | Permanent
   

  

**What’s in it for you?**
**Let’s Care About Everything That Makes You, You**
 We are committed to nurturing an inclusive environment where everyone feels they belong. We offer a hybrid working model, which recognizes the value of striking a balance between in-person collaboration and remote working. Please feel free to discuss flexible working arrangements with us.
   

  

**Let’s care for your financial wellbeing**
 We believe in rewarding performance with a great compensation and benefits package (details vary by location), including a generous bonus scheme and pension.
   

  

**Let’s care for your opportunities to progress**
 From career development and digital learning programs to international career mobility, we offer lifelong learning for our employees worldwide and an environment where innovation, delivery and empowerment are fostered.
   

  

**Let’s care for life’s twists and turns**
 From our support for flexible working, health and wellbeing (including private healthcare and generous parental leave benefits), to helping people return from career breaks with experience that nothing else can teach. We've got your back.
   

  

**Let’s care for our society and our planet**
 With opportunities to be engaged in shaping a future that is safe, inclusive and sustainable, we care for the tomorrows of our people, our industry and our clients.
   

  

**Care to join us?**
 Allianz Commercial is the center of expertise of Allianz Group, insuring mid-sized businesses, large enterprises, and special risks. Our customers include top consumer brands, financial institutions, industry leaders, the global aviation and shipping industries, as well as family-owned and medium-enterprises. We also cover unique risks such as offshore wind farms, infrastructure projects and film productions. Our clients trust us to provide a wide range of traditional and alternative risk transfer solutions, outstanding risk consulting and multinational services, and seamless claims handling. Allianz Commercial helps customers to prepare for what's ahead.
   

  

 Learn more about careers at Allianz Commercial by clicking here.
   

  

 Learn more about Allianz Commercial by clicking here.
   

  

 At Allianz, we stand for unity: we believe that a united world is a more prosperous world, and we are dedicated to consistently advocating for equal opportunities for all. And the foundation for this is our inclusive workplace, where people and performance both matters, and nurtures a culture grounded in integrity, fairness, inclusion and trust.
   

  

 We therefore welcome applications regardless of ethnicity or cultural background, age, gender, nationality, religion, social class, disability or sexual orientation, or any other characteristics protected under applicable local laws and regulations.
   

  

**Join us.** 
 Let's care for tomorrow.
   

  

**People With Disabilities**
 We want to give all our candidates the best opportunity to succeed.  If you need any adjustments to be made during the application and selection process, please email agcsglobalcareers@allianz.com
   

  

**Recruitment Agencies:** 
  

  

 Allianz Commercial has an in-house recruitment team, which focuses on sourcing great candidates directly.  Allianz Commercial does not accept unsolicited resumes from agency or search firm recruiters.  Fees will not be paid in the event a candidate submitted by a recruiter without an agreement in place is hired.  When we do use agencies, we have a PSL in place, so please do not contact managers directly. Failure to comply could/may result in the disqualification of the candidates and/or the termination of our contract and/or fees not being paid.

title: Senior SIEM Specialist
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a** 
**Senior SIEM Specialist** 
**to team up with the most dedicated team of cyber specialists in our Managed Security Services** 
**domain.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 350 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for a Senior SIEM Specialist who wants to make a difference in our Managed Security Services domain.
   

  

**Managed Security Services**
 Truesec helps customers globally with Managed Detection & Response including Attack Prediction Services, Vulnerability Management Services for both IT and OT environment. Our services are all delivered by skilled security analysis teams that conduct 24/7 attack monitoring, threat hunting, threat intelligence analysis, and threat remediation. Our team of experts works tirelessly to identify and prevent cyber breaches, and to help increase our customers’ proactive cybersecurity defenses. Our goal is to be an extension of our customers’ IT organizations, customizing a combination of capabilities and tooling, tailored to prevent cyber attacks in the most efficient way.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Senior SIEM Specialist, you will focus on developing and implementing SIEM solutions to monitor and analyze security threat technology within automation, cloud and big data. Your responsibility will be to design and architecture of SIEM solutions to ensure the systems are implemented and configured properly to retain, correlate, and monitor event logs. You will also evaluate current capabilities and lead improvement projects, as well as act as an internal and external advisory regarding SIEM and log. You will support onboarding and maintenance of a wide variety of data sources to include various OS, appliances, and application logs including creating queries and visualizations to support customer requirements and monitoring of the SIEM deployment. In this role you will be part of a team of specialists and experts in various areas.
   

  

**Your Potential Background**
 We believe you have good knowledge of SIEM and good knowledge of at least one general scripting language as well as experience in programming, system administration and use case development for security monitoring. You have a passion for logs and advisory and thrive in a fast environment where your knowledge and expertise are valued.
   

  

**Required Skills:**
* Strong understanding of security concepts, principles, and best practices
* Working knowledge of Windows and Linux
* Knowledge in scripting such as PowerShell and/or Python
* Experience working with big data platforms and tools
* Strong analytical ability and experience interpreting complex datasets
* Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to manage urgent work situations


**Bonus Skills:**
* Microsoft Sentinel
* CrowdStrike Next Gen SIEM
* Google SecOps
* Logscale
* ELK Stack
* Cloud technologies (Azure, AWS and/or GCP)


*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Postdoctoral Research position (3 Years)
description:
**Qualifications**
 The Swedish Museum of Natural History is a government agency with a mandate to promote knowledge, research and interest in our world. It is a prominent research institution and Sweden's largest museum. For more than 200 years, the museum has been collecting specimens and data and conducting research on life on earth. The collections contain more than 11 million plants, animals, fungi, environmental samples, minerals and fossils. All research and knowledge are shared in the exhibitions, Cosmonova and in activities at the museum and digitally. The Department of Bioinformatics and Genetics at the Swedish Museum of Natural History invites applications for a postdoctoral fellowship position focused on investigating genetic load and the accumulation of deleterious variation in ancient human populations. This is a three-year research position, of which two years will be carried out abroad at a host institution in Dublin, Ireland, followed by a return phase in Stockholm. The position is intended for a candidate who will bring their own external research funding covering the full duration of the project, including salary, travel, and research costs. WORK TASKS The project aims to leverage large-scale ancient genomic datasets to understand how demographic events such as bottlenecks, migrations, isolation, and admixture have shaped the burden of deleterious mutations in human populations through time. By integrating palaeogenomics, evolutionary theory, and modern computational approaches, the research will provide new insights into how past population dynamics influence present-day patterns of health-related genetic variation. The project will be supervised by Dr. Tom van der Valk at the Centre for Palaeogenomics, a joint initiative of the Swedish Museum of Natural History and Stockholm University. During the outgoing phase, the successful candidate will be embedded in a leading research group in Dublin specializing in evolutionary and statistical genomics. QUALIFICATIONS Applicants must:
   

  

* Hold a PhD in evolutionary genomics, population genetics, bioinformatics, or a closely related field.
* Demonstrate strong analytical skills in population-genetic inference.
* Have experience working with ancient genomic datasets.
* Show evidence of scientific independence and the ability to lead a research project.
* Possess excellent written and spoken English. Preferred Qualifications (Merits) The following experience will be considered advantageous:
* Analysis of ancient human genomic data.
* Estimation of mutational load, selection coefficients, or demographic history.
* Working with low-coverage sequencing dat.
* Proficiency in Python and/or R and reproducible computational workflows.
* Experience using HPC environments.
* A strong interest in human evolutionary history. The role requires the candidate to bring their own external funding. OTHER Applicants should submit: A cover letter (max. 1 page) describing:
* Research interests and motivation
* Planned funding scheme
* How their expertise fits the project A curriculum vitae (CV). We advance our knowledge of the natural world, inspiring to better care of our planet. Our ambition is that the employees of The Swedish Museum of Natural History shall represent the diversity in Sweden and we welcome every applicant.


 We have decided upon choices for marketing. Therefore we decline contact with sales agents, recruitment sites and similar.
